name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Urge your Senators to Confirm Amy Coney Barrett
body:
| | Peter, This morning the Senate Judiciary Committee began confirmation hearings for Amy Coney Barrett to fill the vacancy on the Court left by Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. The hearing is expected to last four days. During that time, Americans will not only get to know Judge Barrett and her judicial philosophy, they will also witness the stark contrast between the two political parties and their plans for the Supreme Court. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=K7OK5pFGmYW9jqf9nL6D5X28Mxc1j8O13UM3enc1Eds&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201012p2a01&n=1) One party plans to honor the 150 year Court precedent of a nine-justice Court, and the other plans to pack the Court by adding more justices to gain a majority to advance their political ideology. As Judge Coney Barrett said in her remarks today, "Courts are not designed to solve every problem or right every wrong in our public life. The policy decisions and value judgments of government must be made by the political branches elected by and accountable to the People. The public should not expect courts to do so, and courts should not try." It’s time that America nominate and confirm justices to the Supreme Court who believe in upholding the Constitution as the law of the land. We need justices who interpret the law passed by our elected leaders, rather than legislating from the bench. **Judge Coney Barrett concluded her opening remarks this morning by stating in part, “I believe in the power of prayer, and it has been uplifting to hear that so many people are praying for me.”** Thank you for praying for Judge Barrett. We know she did not take the decision lightly to accept President Trump’s nomination as she knew it would require great sacrifices by her family. **I want to urge you to do two things right now:**
1. **Continue to pray** for Judge Coney Barrett, her family, and all of the senators during this hearing.
2. **[Contact your senators](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=K7OK5pFGmYW9jqf9nL6D5X28Mxc1j8O13UM3enc1Eds&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201012p2a01&n=2)** and urge them to confirm Amy Coney Barrett as the next United States Supreme Court Justice.

Use the My Faith Votes simple tool to send an email message to your senators. We have the suggested copy written for you. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=K7OK5pFGmYW9jqf9nL6D5X28Mxc1j8O13UM3enc1Eds&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201012p2a01&n=3) It’s critical that your senators hear from you ahead of this important election cycle to know that you believe it is their Constitutional duty to fill this Supreme Court vacancy with no politically motivated delays. [Please contact your senators now.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=K7OK5pFGmYW9jqf9nL6D5X28Mxc1j8O13UM3enc1Eds&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201012p2a01&n=4) And then send this email message to your friends and family and ask them to do the same. Together, let’s ensure Christians are heard loud and clear on Capitol Hill. **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201012p2a01&n=5)
---
* * *

#
The sense of connection I feel to our service members runs deep. My dad was in the Army for 25 years and some of the most influential people in my life have been members of the Armed Forces.

I take very seriously the responsibility of ensuring our veterans and service members receive the respect, gratitude, and resources they need.

When I'm in Congress, I'll lead with informed, strategic diplomacy, keep the VA funded, invest in mental health services, and prioritize the lives and livelihoods of our soldiers rather than the private defense contractors sucking up the DoD's ample budget.

But to fight for any of those things on the House floor, **I need to win this election**. I am in this race going up against an incumbent backed by corporate PACs, while I have refused that dirty money. That is why I need you.

[Can I count on you to chip in and help us flip this district?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c042799975&e=140a9b81e7)
Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Supreme Court (sign the petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Today, Senate Republicans are moving forward with their plan to confirm President Trump's nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, to the Supreme Court. As a member of the Judiciary Committee, I'll be seeking answers from this nominee about her views on issues like the Affordable Care Act.
Let's be clear: the main reason Republicans are pushing so hard to rush this confirmation is to install a Supreme Court Justice who will overturn the Affordable Care Act. We all need to keep speaking out to protect the integrity of the Supreme Court and the future of affordable health care, reproductive rights, and so much more. Will you join me in the fight?
**[Sign my petition to tell Republicans to stop this partisan confirmation hearing now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4586/42ab3cf4/67b55790/135d1004/540042322/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/stop-amy-coney-barrett?source=em201012i_1038&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Election Day is just 22 days away. The American people should have their say in November before the Senate fills any vacancy on the Supreme Court. But Republicans don't want to wait -- flouting their own precedent from 2016 -- because they need a new Justice by November 10 to rule against the Affordable Care Act and strip coverage from millions of vulnerable Americans.
This is the moment for the people to make their voices heard, Peter.
**[Add your name now to join me in the fight to stop this confirmation.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4586/42ab3cf4/67b55790/135d1004/540042322/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/stop-amy-coney-barrett?source=em201012i_1038&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[Sign the Petition](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4586/42ab3cf4/67b55790/135d1004/540042322/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/stop-amy-coney-barrett?source=em201012i_1038&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *

---

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher Refuses To Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Representative Fletcher Refuses To Debate, Denies Voters Accountability and Transparency**

Houston, TX - Today, Representative Fletcher officially declined to participate in an open, nonpartisan debate with Candidate Wesley Hunt. The Hunt Campaign first contacted the Fletcher Campaign more than a 6 weeks ago, extending invitations to multiple open, televised debates. After Representative Fletcher declined to respond, KHOU extended yet another invitation to an open, televised debate hosted at a neutral location less than two blocks from Fletcher's home. And finally, the 6 Mayors of the Memorial Villages extended an invitation to Fletcher and Hunt to engage in an open, nonpartisan debate hosted at a neutral location. And still, Fletcher refused. Fletcher's actions amount to a deliberate attempt to conceal her record and deny voters a chance to hear directly from their next elected Representative.

_"I am disappointed that Lizzie Fletcher is once again neglecting her responsibilities as an elected Representative,"_ **said Hunt.** _"The residents of the 7th District have a right to hear their candidates defend their views and explain their policy positions. Over 6 weeks ago, my campaign reached out to the Fletcher Campaign in a good faith effort to provide 7th District voters the accountability and transparency they deserve. Yet, my opponent has chosen to obstruct this vital aspect of our democratic process. Representative Fletcher, you cannot hide from your record forever. The 7th District deserves better." _

Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. Hunt has previously challenged Fletcher to debate, with no response from the Fletcher campaign. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.

###

clean_body: Representative Fletcher Refuses To Debate, Denies Voters Accountability and Transparency Houston, TX - Today, Representative Fletcher officially declined to participate in an open, nonpartisan debate with Candidate Wesley Hunt. The Hunt Campaign first contacted the Fletcher Campaign more than a 6 weeks ago, extending invitations to multiple open, televised debates. After Representative Fletcher declined to respond, KHOU extended yet another invitation to an open, televised debate hosted at a neutral location less than two blocks from Fletcher's home. And finally, the 6 Mayors of the Memorial Villages extended an invitation to Fletcher and Hunt to engage in an open, nonpartisan debate hosted at a neutral location. And still, Fletcher refused. Fletcher's actions amount to a deliberate attempt to conceal her record and deny voters a chance to hear directly from their next elected Representative. "I am disappointed that Lizzie Fletcher is once again neglecting her responsibilities as an elected Representative," said Hunt. "The residents of the 7th District have a right to hear their candidates defend their views and explain their policy positions. Over 6 weeks ago, my campaign reached out to the Fletcher Campaign in a good faith effort to provide 7th District voters the accountability and transparency they deserve. Yet, my opponent has chosen to obstruct this vital aspect of our democratic process. Representative Fletcher, you cannot hide from your record forever. The 7th District deserves better." Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. Hunt has previously challenged Fletcher to debate, with no response from the Fletcher campaign. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District. **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Amy Coney Barrett hearings started today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Today, the Senate Judiciary Committee started hearings to confirm President Trump's anti-health care Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett.

Wade.
**[We need to send a message to Republicans on the Judiciary Committee that families' health care is on the ballot -- and defeat every single one of them in 2020. Will you rush in a $5 contribution to support the Democrats running against John Cornyn, Joni Ernst, and Lindsey Graham?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201012-judiciary-slate?refcode=em201012i_510&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
In Texas, MJ Hegar has the momentum in the race to defeat John Cornyn and turn Texas blue.
In Iowa, the latest polls show Theresa Greenfield ahead of Joni Ernst in this pivotal Senate race.
And in South Carolina, Jaime Harrison is running neck-and-neck against Lindsey Graham.
**[As Republicans move forward with the partisan Supreme Court hearings, you can fight back at the ballot box. Pitch in $5 to defeat GOP Senators and flip the Senate.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201012-judiciary-slate?refcode=em201012i_510&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

body:
There are several new public polls that we wanted to share with
you as we are just a few short weeks from what could be the most
important election in our lifetime.

Fellow Conservative:

There are several new public polls that we wanted to
share with you as we are just a few short weeks from what could
be the most important election in our lifetime.

Iowa - Sen. Joni Ernst (-4)Michigan - John James
(-1)Montana - Sen. Steve Daines (Tied)Georgia - Sen. David Perdue
(-1)

These races are very competitive and will determine
whether Chuck Schumer and the Democrats take over the Senate.

Please support these four conservative Senate
candidates with a split donation right now.

No amount is too small.

The Democrats are beating us in candidate
fundraising because they're raising significantly more
small-dollar contributions.

But we love our country and we want to keep it
great, and I know we can match the liberals and push our
candidates to victory.

The last FEC deadline of the 2020 elections is this
Wednesday night so please do what you can right now.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

Support These Senate Candidates Before the October
15 Deadline

Sen. Joni Ernst (R-IA)

Sen. David Perdue (R-GA)

John James (R-MI)

Sen. Steve Daines (R-MT)

DONATE HERE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

body:
Everything comes down to this.
| Peter,
---
Wednesday (10/14) is our **FINAL** FEC deadline of the election.
---
This isn't just some artificial line in the sand -- all of our expenditures from the 15th until Election Day depend on this last report.
---
We're still $87,571 short of our goal, and if we don't meet this FINAL deadline, we won't be able to place any of our remaining ad-buys.
---
It's up to YOU to ensure we can show Virginians the TRUTH about Mark Warner: that he's a career politician who sold out to the Swamp and broke every single one of his promises to you.
---

name: Team Finello
subject: Get Out The Vote for Christina Finello
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/76523/images/FinelloForCongress_PrimaryLogo%20%281%29.png]
Hi Peter, There are only 22 days left until the most important election of our lifetime! Ballots are being mailed out across the District and we know Christina has what it takes to flip the district blue and be the first Congresswoman from PA-01 in history. We can't do this alone, so join us to Get Out The Vote in PA-01 over these next few weeks! [http://www.finello.vote/gotv] This weekend (10/17 & 10/18) is our GOTV kickoff where we will start talking to thousands of voters and making plans to vote! Get Out The Vote is now more important than ever - We need you to signup for at least 4 volunteer shifts to make sure that every elgible voter in PA-01 gets to the polls! [http://www.finello.vote/gotv] www.finello.vote/gotv [www.finello.vote/gotv] Join Christina and Team Finello, Get Involved, And Speak To Community Members During GOTV About Why We Need To Flip PA-01 Blue! [https://www.finello.vote/gotv] This our last chance to make sure Christina Finello is the next Representative from PA-01. Team Finello will provide comprehensive trainings before each of the shifts to ensure that everybody who joins us is comfortable, excited, and more than ready to speak with community members in PA-01.Momentum & excitement is building in the District! With your help, we will elect Christina as the first woman to represent PA-01 in Congress & flip PA-01 Blue!
Best, Team Finello
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christina-finello-web-signup?refcode=volunteer]
Paid for by Finello for Congress
Finello for Congress
P.O. Box 2772
Warminster, PA 18974
United States

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Philadelphia Inquirer endorses Nina Ahmad for Pa. Auditor General in 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Posted: October 12, 2020 - 6:00 AM | [The Inquirer Editorial Board](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/uYT49jPzSNEB8fw0OFm1YkDieVeyViXkKBAPOP0O4eo=) I am proud to be endorsed by our hometown paper. I am honored that the editorial board of the Philadelphia Inquirer believes in me and supports the vision I have for the office of Auditor General. As the chief fiscal watchdog I will ensure that your tax dollars are used with integrity, accountability and transparency. I am a scientist, an advocate, a trailblazer, and a Democrat. My mantra "Leave No One Behind", includes every corner of our Pennsylvania. **[Can you please help me today with ](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/tESXC8u70psCdCpahudataC3oaadJAjEqDebqTevmbw=)****[$5](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/tESXC8u70psCdCpahudataC3oaadJAjEqDebqTevmbw=),_ _****[$10, $20.20 or $100? Can I count on you to help get my message to all of PA?](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/tESXC8u70psCdCpahudataC3oaadJAjEqDebqTevmbw=)** Thank you in advance and together we can move PA forward. Humbly Yours,
Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/fMJ2D0vQa_E4obmnPzapBndKNx7Fyzx-uzY2khZzRbs=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/tESXC8u70psCdCpahudataC3oaadJAjEqDebqTevmbw=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/SBrjENEUoWuMDbP0tiT_9UzWJoe1ptg4te5gBXKW8gU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/A2_squh6Dtsf3bCdeHhgeHmD3XZJQOghE-b6foRVHuI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TN6sAqw4sjHQrGb1GttsOobHPbq5DxtjuvYVDg3B3XI=/PEPAWuwIUWFzSnUqTXWkRjn-eCKRz2v1ASAxWX4ltlw=?hl=en)

name: Joe Sanberg
subject: Support Dana Barrett!
body:
It’s crucial that we do all we can to help elect politicians who share our mission. We are proud to endorse Dana Barrett in her bid to defeat incumbent Rep. Barry Loudermilk.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20253434/256264822/-2147125543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4ZjMwMTYyLTVjMGQtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o20MdI_frB-DUJ7Cwd8OM0ooVu4q_k5RTQOw2rz9tZo=&emci=72a697d1-f00c-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=e8f30162-5c0d-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=7114755)
Dear Peter, **It’s crucial that we do all we can to help elect politicians who share our mission.** The issues that we find important will be on the ballot in November, and there are several races where we have the opportunity to support candidates that align with our values. One of those races will take place in Georgia’s 11th Congressional District. **We are proud to endorse Dana Barrett** in her bid to defeat incumbent Rep. Barry Loudermilk. **Like us, she believes that our government should serve everyday Americans** , not wealthy individuals or corporations–and she recognizes that it is vital that we put money in the hands of hard-working Americans. There is no doubt in our minds that she will serve as a fierce and tireless advocate for working people all across Georgia. | | [Chip in Now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20253435/256264825/-2147125543?emci=0d7a3524-6bd3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=cb518e00-15d4-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=1792884&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4ZjMwMTYyLTVjMGQtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o20MdI_frB-DUJ7Cwd8OM0ooVu4q_k5RTQOw2rz9tZo=)
---
**Her opponent is the polar opposite.** Rep. Loudermilk has repeatedly put politics over people, sided with wealthy individuals and corporations over working Americans, and disregarded the interests of hard-working Georgians for political and personal gain. He has made it clear who he serves—and it is not the people of Georgia. **In order for our agenda to be enacted, politicians like Rep. Loudermilk must be defeated.**
We are proud to endorse Dana Barrett for U.S. Congress, and we call on all our supporters to do all that they can do to get her elected.
In solidarity,
Team Working Hero
| [Let's Build a Better World Together!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20253436/256264826/-2147125543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4ZjMwMTYyLTVjMGQtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o20MdI_frB-DUJ7Cwd8OM0ooVu4q_k5RTQOw2rz9tZo=&emci=72a697d1-f00c-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=e8f30162-5c0d-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=7114755)
---

10877 Wilshire Blvd
Los Angeles, CA 90024

name: Corky Messner
subject: Save the Senate!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/6e190ea203883153c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, We are EXACTLY 21 days away from the most important election of our lifetime.

Pundits say that every election cycle, but this time they’re right. The White House and U.S. Senate majority hang in the balance... and so does the future of the Supreme Court and our entire Constitution.

_And that’s why I need a favor._

We’re up against a crucial deadline — our LAST FEC deadline — and we’re seeing a FLOOD of Democrat ads trying to stop us from flipping this seat and defending the Republican majority.

**[Will you please chip in $50, $10, or even just $5 to help us fight back?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/4190b35a16f17a0ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [DONATE $5 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/9883a86505a1deadc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $10 NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/bd5109e7cfc06e98c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/0e62422a895a2b1bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) The Democrats know that if we defeat Jeanne Shaheen, they have NO chance of winning the Senate majority.

So, they’re determined to prop her up — and tear me down.

_**And they’re spending MILLIONS to do so**_.

I’m going to leave it all on the field for the next 21 days — **but I can’t do this without YOU.[Chip in now, _before our final FEC deadline_ , and help us fight back against their false attacks](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/4ab37e86133ccfc5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

I’m counting on your swift response, Corky Messner [DONATE NOW TO SAVE THE SENATE!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/3eb19353cd5a4153c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/f7e1c40627206534c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8a91899b024391bf/ca0f1378c32fb59cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Vote early at State Farm Arena!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa489/34a064cc/1a058503/702c85d/3744774503/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend, Early in-person voting in Georgia is now open through Friday, October 30. And many folks are asking, "Where should I go vote?" For Fulton County voters, State Farm Arena is a convenient (and fun) choice. The Atlanta Hawks have graciously opened State Farm Arena as an early voting site, with free parking, easy MARTA access, and more than 300 machines to serve voters. Many voters there waited 15 minutes or less to cast their ballots. If you are a Fulton County voter and want to make your voice heard and your ballot counted at State Farm Arena, check out the resources below to help make your early voting plan today. **State Farm Arena Early Voting Dates and Hours:** Monday, October 12 to Saturday, October 24: 8am - 6pm
Sunday, October 18 and 25: 10am - 6pm
Monday, October 26 to Friday, October 30: 7am - 7pm **Driving directions and alternative transportation: ** Riding MARTA is an option, and voters will enter State Farm Arena through Gate 4 (MARTA Entrance). State Farm Arena is conveniently located near the GWCC/CNN Center Station located on the Green/Blue (East/West Lines). For more info on safety protocols and how to ride visit [itsmarta.com/howtoride](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa489/34a064cc/1a058503/702c85a/3744774503/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://itsmarta.com/howtoride"). Please follow signage to appropriate entrances. For directions and more info visit [statefarmarena.com/plan-your-visit/parking-transportation-voting](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa489/34a064cc/1a058503/702c85b/3744774503/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://statefarmarena.com/plan-your-visit/parking-transportation-voting"). Thanks for being a Georgia voter! In solidarity, -Stacey P.S. Not a Fulton County voter? Go to IWillVote.com for information about voting in your area. Did you request your mail ballot? Fill it out right away and return it to a drop box. Find a drop box near you at IWillVote.com. |

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Time to Make Them Pay
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=time_for_them_to_pay&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I so badly wanted to see the Democrats come to their senses yesterday and finally vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers. But those radicals wouldn't even allow a vote on the resolution. Instead, yesterday's legislative session was full of Democrats politically posturing, claiming ownership of the real science and even mask shaming a female legislator. While countless Minnesotans like you and me are negatively impacted by Governor Walz' unilateral orders, Democrat politicians are hell bent on protecting their Party's governor.
### **That means a line has been drawn!**
We're no longer encouraging you to contact your legislator and tell them to vote the right way. These Democrats have failed you now seven times. They refused to join five other Democrats and all Republicans with a little common sense. Now it's time to make them pay for voting against our liberties. The election is only three weeks away. Action 4 Liberty will be spending time, money and treasure over the next three weeks in these targeted districts, informing voters of what they did. **"Politician Brad Tabke voted against opening our economy seven times."** **"John Persell has Governor Walz' back, but not yours."** **"You can't count on Dan Wolgamott protecting your rights in St Paul."** Peter, we are going to take this message to tens of thousands of voters in targeted districts from now until November 3rd. This will cost a lot of money, but that's what is needed to win this battle. clean_body: | Peter \-- I so badly wanted to see the Democrats come to their senses yesterday and finally vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers. But those radicals wouldn't even allow a vote on the resolution. Instead, yesterday's legislative session was full of Democrats politically posturing, claiming ownership of the real science and even mask shaming a female legislator. While countless Minnesotans like you and me are negatively impacted by Governor Walz' unilateral orders, Democrat politicians are hell bent on protecting their Party's governor. That means a line has been drawn! We're no longer encouraging you to contact your legislator and tell them to vote the right way. These Democrats have failed you now seven times. They refused to join five other Democrats and all Republicans with a little common sense. Now it's time to make them pay for voting against our liberties. The election is only three weeks away. name: Team Cornyn
subject: purely political
body:
Friend, During his opening remarks for the confirmation hearings of Amy Coney Barrett this morning, Senator Cornyn reminded everyone watching that the Constitution clearly states, no religious test shall ever be required as a qualification.
But shortly after the Senator reminded everyone about this fundamental American principle, Senator Whitehouse from Rhode Island launched an unnecessary and false attack directly at the Senator. [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001blX6IuKoudYBgW9y7wrUteuGz7b-1dc9a8UYk3D3IAbonZCKZGp3QdqYUfKxaZc4bpJ4_D5J4UYmcNlwGiihbDVVQs99ZyVxhpJ5D0vZJE9fYzwE5IugDU7fHpTjKA4CvSpqQZq45SAcsRGUPLBTCvho_hArKeJ17_BC-2nBNeuTa_mKrP6hKmmPKefdNYaKdHnJUuJVTx6WxZCcIvMdFlHKKZhrxJuWvvyODsyLwr5qD2Ow50bgm0WT_d6LymDUY8-ZEKI9YVKl6BJ6NnrTMLPxteOxYqbRqrzEwcsHN1nquxoiNza0Q8uQl2lsicv9ba8e8sDieI3nB_T9j4n5z8_-kx_UxcIgrrcc4ft7aemo0QpxctL_TpN1vOlSs3V-&c=kMrC6scrgUqUI-aZafFRpjMW1fgYsBcHC1B6zMg68ysO3pqKIz6OAg==&ch=QwGD40moKQkafg02jXOf3bhKSP1vtRz7r1im7Fzt5iGvJm29mdqOnQ==) **The bizarre spectacle that ensued made crystal clear Democrats only care about playing election-year politics.**

We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. name: Tim Scott
subject: Complete and total HOGWASH
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
First, Senate Democrats call my effort to reform the criminal justice system "token". Then they attack me on social media, calling me "Uncle Tom" for daring to have a different point of view. Now, they are attacking Amy Coney Barrett's Christian faith and calling into question her integrity.
Hey Friend,

_Hogwash.

Complete and total hogwash!_

**I am sorry to use foul language, but the attacks I am reading against Amy Coney Barrett 's Christian faith are deeply troubling.**

First, Senate Democrats call my effort to reform the criminal justice system "token".

Then they attack me on social media, calling me "Uncle Tom" for daring to have a different point of view.

Now, they are attacking Amy Coney Barrett's Christian faith and calling into question her integrity.

**[It's hogwash. Plain and simple](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hogwash/?utm_campaign=20201013_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1035402-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201013_complete-and-total-hogwash).**

Friend, we cannot sit back and allow these attacks to go unanswered.

[**Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to fight back against these deeply disturbing attacks from the Left?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hogwash/?utm_campaign=20201013_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1035402-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201013_complete-and-total-hogwash)
[Fight the Hogwash >>> Donate Now](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hogwash/?utm_campaign=20201013_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1035402-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201013_complete-and-total-hogwash)
---
These attacks are more than just political rhetoric or insults typed on a keyboard; they are words that divide our country.

We can do better.

Having the support of committed conservatives like you, Friend, gives me the energy to keep fighting for our conservative values.

The next time you read an insult or attack against me or Amy Coney Barrett, just remember it's total hogwash and get motivated to help fight back.
[Fight the Hogwash >>> Donate Now](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hogwash/?utm_campaign=20201013_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1035402-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201013_complete-and-total-hogwash)
---
Tim Scott

---
**[BOOST OUR AD](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=e21299be8c&e=e25784ff28)**
---

We’ve just released our second ad proving that not only can Dana talk the talk, but she can walk the walk.

Let’s be frank: Dana is not an ordinary politician. She’s a Georgian who disapproved of her Congressman and knew she could do a better job. After all, this is America and that’s what democracy is all about.

**That’s why Dana fights for accessible healthcare, equal economic opportunity, and government reform. Contrast that with her opponent, Barry Loudermilk, who has not, and**** _will not,_****fight for the people of Georgia’s 11th (his record proves it).**

To make sure Dana comes out on top, we need to ensure that our district knows what she stands for. Ads like this one are crucial to spreading Dana’s message, but we need your help to boost it.

[**Can you chip in $35 right now to boost this ad across all of our social platforms and our district?**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=05017d0e0b&e=e25784ff28)
**[BOOST OUR AD](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=fa22a9a2ad&e=e25784ff28)**
---

We’re in the homestretch now, and we can’t make it across the finish line without you.

Thanks,
\-- Team Barrett

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: We're almost there
body:
Today marks three weeks until Election Day.The next three weeks will prove crucial. People are already casting their ballots early and through the ... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e8dbcdbbdd27/were-almost-there?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Today marks three weeks until Election Day.

The next three weeks will prove crucial. People are already casting their ballots early and through the mail in record droves and this election will likely have the largest turnout we’ve ever seen. _That means we have to reach more voters than any campaign has here in the 16th district ever before._ We need a lot more money to do this.

[Click here to chip in $3 to help us get through the next 3 weeks?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2a4608cc6b&e=140a9b81e7)

It’s important that we expand our majority in the House so that we can get progressive policy enacted for working families. I am running on a platform of expanding healthcare access, taking action on the climate crisis, and passing comprehensive campaign finance reform. My opponent stands in the way of these things, choosing to instead fight for his corporate PAC donors over the people of this district. **Unlike him, I will never sell you out.**

Because he’s got hundreds of thousands of dollars in dirty money backing him, I rely on small dollar donors like you. But you know what? I’m perfectly fine with that, because I know you have my back - just like I have yours.

[__So can I count on you to help us continue the Blue Wave and wash out the last Republican in northern Illinois?__](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d2a0ee3fba&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

**That’s right, in just three short weeks they’ll close the polls and count the ballots.**
On Team Kennedy, we’re spending every hour of every day working to make sure we win on November 3 because there’s too much at stake.
For Pete Sessions, being a representative is not a job of service, it’s an opportunity for power — his own power. __**He cannot be allowed to return to Washington.**__
Sessions climbed the ranks of the Washington GOP by selling out Texans to corporate special interests, attempting to gut the Affordable Care Act, and allegedly accepting campaign cash to funnel illegal Russian money to fellow GOP candidates.
Session’s record is damning, possibly criminal, and a threat to our community. We are the only thing standing between him and another chance to con his constituents.
**But we need your help now. If we don’t have enough resources, we can’t get Rick’s Texan-first agenda in front of voters and Sessions will win without a fight.[_So, with just 21 days to go, can you make a contribution right now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20262476/256306641/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201013day21_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQzNTM4Ny03NTBkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZFLvO12F7vLt7uzEpD17AoOdat2DVy68MdfDxRWhEuQ=)**

clean_body: We’re just 21 days away from the big day, folks! | = We’re just 21 days away from the big day, folks. | = = That’s right, in just three short weeks they’ll close the polls and count the ballots. On Team Kennedy, we’re spending every hour of every day working to make sure we win on November 3 because there’s too much at stake. For Pete Sessions, being a representative is not a job of service, it’s an opportunity for power — his own power. He cannot be allowed to return to Washington. Sessions climbed the ranks of the Washington GOP by selling out Texans to corporate special interests, attempting to gut the Affordable Care Act, and allegedly accepting campaign cash to funnel illegal Russian money to fellow GOP candidates. Session’s record is damning, possibly criminal, and a threat to our community. We are the only thing standing between him and another chance to con his constituents. But we need your help now. If we don’t have enough resources, we can’t get Rick’s Texan-first agenda in front of voters and Sessions will win without a fight.= If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Kennedy | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

clean_body: He raised $20 million more than Beto's historic fundraising numbers. We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,** | Peter - My Democrat opponent's fundraising numbers are out, and they're BIG. It's becoming clear - the radical Left is determined to spend their way to victory. Jaime Harrison raised $57 million in the last three months - the most ever raised in a single quarter by any Senate candidate in U.S. history! This brings his grand total to $86 million to fund his massive negative ad campaign against me. Peter, from their nationwide network of elite liberal bankrollers, the Left is pouring unprecedented amounts into this race, determined to defeat me and seize the majority in the U.S. Senate. We will win this pivotal race if we have the resources needed to counter the Democrats' huge media campaign with our own effective messaging! That's why I'm coming to you today, Peter. | | | | | | | Let's show the Left they can't buy this Senate seat - or the Senate majority - with their liberal millions. ** Thanks, Lindsey Graham | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. body:
That is what John Hickenlooper called Cory Gardner's 9-8-8 bill, the Great American Outdoors Act, and other bipartisan bills Cory has authored during his time in the Senate. Meaningless.
Meaningless, Friend.

That is what John Hickenlooper called Cory Gardner's 9-8-8 bill, the Great American Outdoors Act, and other bipartisan bills Cory has authored during his time in the Senate. **Meaningless**.

Having had eleven bills signed into law, more than the entire Colorado Congressional delegation combined, Cory's bills are far from meaningless. These bills created opportunities, gave people a fighting chance, gave people hope, and changed lives.

To continue with this, though, Friend, we need your help. The election is 21 days away, and every day is becoming more important than the last. Can you chip in today to ensure Colorado's future stays in the hands of a meaningful Senator who cares about our state's future and the people in it?

subject: 55 donations short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | [](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmKqkRxGT-oGQZvqjpilk6axzeao-_7tv9VWJuHdNj01DqDxquo0XqT1DhpzSUbDmJ9aFjdjsxvwNaqJ3islsgPGzBT2lv7OaOWW4fXmpFQni33pcc4rSyGZWIMcVdG-cgfkYSMVZkNLv6KUpElCIFa-KcjKMtDqIwy8AaW_8xuO7xw04rvbcg4Q4nrCQ3EHn02-3jfrfD6hf9CI9hp7GNA8w%3D%3D)

Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmKqHqYEDoIXUhYymfPPdxtgGg8cMczhOR8y0JjBTU4izV9qotiGio5T44y4T4K1Ve2bCtXDqWtyI6eTylczAU7Y1FpzZ7jIS_ygjQ-YYMTHvkwWafeTxnewCvJgqxXvtNfcM8c-99ArCH_EE5Aq-r9GkS7yjWwbSHNklFrthcz5GXO2XZ4P9HZemsykOvMHJeOlD2aaClU2GH36LKRL5X-2w%3D%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmKeOQY2IxXR42lgFMZp2a0DUPtSOQBA4nh1p6vje2b0_my2yq5MlAWSAVdjhwhya5bTYwkgXoxCsSbOfV0BUBC3pKCA2henDNhuqDVUUpBUzJnSCfbJmgLiYWrj8vFIkjjr-zIzIZhdT2_Mj9Q5A_HqZnMyO4R1wdzK-Z-c5KP4ut2UxbViVzd6aY9O8rBLgHYyBoTcjcynrAZi-zSBvEjGQ%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP US PROTECT THE SENATE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmKutrAgbdlp0DE7S364Q5tedoDyBysCKgEfuiwD7smND5-ZniIRBUb3kKr-Iqx8ufP0SPnrS14siiB8_2bdI1v9BLZzBesFEBV9IoKlLLtvxbVBqM1n_TlfKr7whg6mnGDgTajq-2-tn2f1SuvFoqjefeJ6RcbE6Eu7h3S5jNx9LLB9n3U8r_edL7susr_VQgGILJQKkrH4DsrzbGOFg5IUw%3D%3D)
---

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmKf4XRseZ4tRhXCnneptK3n2PAwb6uXHhV2tZukmjwk19E5Lv47d1Vt4PnQNyNGDjWnbaVbxtymyg_2CZwqs4JVjgJiI0REuKIWXVwjB8pY5OXU03gj2oK5pYfKB3wC5wylC1haNSYMw8H3At_w-pOP9eW24Nf1uAeb8mIhL7LMdL03xJQ_N-ABv1KLm7WgYvALYCzlLZAvhJvHEFF53ZIqA%3D%3D)**

[**STAND WITH STEVE DAINES AND LINDSEY GRAHAM ->**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmKSWDxkwM11q0Sxs7Yayg_ZiuYY5jzQpsvpzrYVEqOAQotmxrFecdwcchoHZiij-h5ZD1PUu4RbiOshUu_Msx2ZbqlM01preHlgp41QrREZDzqOHXwyqBPj4SftUYcCWZxvgtw7rk_sp-jD14Gi8SEAdGc3pZA4PYvNLDyJXI2JigzaLdWspAB_zHCCdAXk-DsQRvh8g4pebqOhZLTQFy4qQ%3D%3D)
---

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The donation you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmK1MiV86kG-2iR4vRaGgwyc_p87kMkdejyN3hxWc0W9YE7COPBEgeo5arOKi3V2cOYv6a3mL2_BTI7SsbdTfJDcb8e8KMg5fbBmIh6wZSxt1WOpPdcQiP2SJbfpQ9Shx4L6aXYG563wX-zH4pdD2lCPAv7rizLyKTcsXt9V4yCWQfZCV99lNxbsBXE4kzYn4lJ8dx6TLbI3ve4buItgBdG9Q%3D%3D)** Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=f11679b794e04b20a95bfcd037e4f1b6&_e=pN9PnpDTvVSO1yBu5b-A2eND1rZ8KNnD5-1XKGvlf12wBjeTpOem4WVZIhzaK-xx9pCxYe6Jjz9jWQVP9oSlUbmhVqgKa5pyfdr-yoi4r5TT-2c2G77na5eh7KoZc-gDW784N7SYHpo2qbFiRa4xyF1MXXmkMykHdqH8WwEX3kkWTklmLRGC6w4cB3icxFmKny17A24WBEII6hFS2CcLkMdM77kwpYeXghO6mbWcYUjvlTOR-R3Kk2Cm6vPo5vu9B48tt8oFrJTXkuY54A779dYEuLWkA3utlwvAyTWjH3wi_G3dYBLmG48ccJ5yQE8cKU2Ozk6AX2IXSiomtWNH3L91g-XB9Rntbf80VYacLofKzaI_NiSexar-ty8NT51j9GMLH1N2yg1laNyN4mGB8Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | Hey Peter, I’m going to cut right to the chase. We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana. It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. | Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents. The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails?

body:

Friend,

This is worse than I imagined.

**We are just 2 days from the FINAL mid-month deadline before the election** , and I am $118,632 short of my goal. With just 3 weeks until Election Day, coming up short would be disastrous. [**Can you pitch in $10, $30, or more to help me reach this important goal?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_SVWAIgjEDO9UwCyQUdp9pU3O_xJAtWBEk498kZDbcOAz30Ix0vM-AyAeHeQinaquz5oKFrRc6bQ-GT_PK-nFDZjUUR7SnJSXiTPas4Pt3i1S2MZwwXyNTUNeFSkR9_b9g2NB6ift-J5By3MyjgiorE326VuJhub79fnA_JUB_87vNT5PXoRwuVrKoKsJSbfRa0TrdrJKJPvPCOWQw2CxbAzYyNA6EmoeUVYcdiWrUtZxjJ2MnUTArZROcJUVkWFtb69iHEvlWuEcz25PlGfwHZ7BYkb-twsL33sJtSItGevhVaIGRnv_ocgqkTaUncSomnIpu7uiyxkaeHJTdrh8iffJ5RdiYo5hf365or9yzTtH2v6376lyLF8hwkR3N_064-oCJ-H4=&c=_KYm-dLi4OGGL0yTEfNaKkZDSTXHUe4mATDZKzZjgCXI-mdeVccy6Q==&ch=Z1IvKNsmgC2XIhSDd6D5n8DMbwaSML5WjYKyJhWKTsRzWbdwncqviA==)

To make matters worse, Joe Biden spent millions on an ad blitz and was just here for a major campaign event in my state. If I don't reach this goal, it'll severely hurt our chances of keeping Arizona and the Senate red.

It's not a secret - Arizona is central to Democrats' 2020 strategy. I'm on the frontlines of defending the Senate, and I urgently need your help. [**Donate today to help me reach our mid-month goal!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_SVWAIgjEDO9UwCyQUdp9pU3O_xJAtWBEk498kZDbcOAz30Ix0vM-AyAeHeQinaquz5oKFrRc6bQ-GT_PK-nFDZjUUR7SnJSXiTPas4Pt3i1S2MZwwXyNTUNeFSkR9_b9g2NB6ift-J5By3MyjgiorE326VuJhub79fnA_JUB_87vNT5PXoRwuVrKoKsJSbfRa0TrdrJKJPvPCOWQw2CxbAzYyNA6EmoeUVYcdiWrUtZxjJ2MnUTArZROcJUVkWFtb69iHEvlWuEcz25PlGfwHZ7BYkb-twsL33sJtSItGevhVaIGRnv_ocgqkTaUncSomnIpu7uiyxkaeHJTdrh8iffJ5RdiYo5hf365or9yzTtH2v6376lyLF8hwkR3N_064-oCJ-H4=&c=_KYm-dLi4OGGL0yTEfNaKkZDSTXHUe4mATDZKzZjgCXI-mdeVccy6Q==&ch=Z1IvKNsmgC2XIhSDd6D5n8DMbwaSML5WjYKyJhWKTsRzWbdwncqviA==)

_Biden 's campaign is confident they can turn Arizona blue._ This is going to be an incredibly close election, and every dollar between now and Election Day is critical to our success.

There's no time to waste. Don't be a bystander this election - we are rapidly approaching Election Day, and I need to know I can count on you! [**Pitch in any amount to help me reach my goal and help defend Arizona from a liberal takeover!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_SVWAIgjEDO9UwCyQUdp9pU3O_xJAtWBEk498kZDbcOAz30Ix0vM-AyAeHeQinaquz5oKFrRc6bQ-GT_PK-nFDZjUUR7SnJSXiTPas4Pt3i1S2MZwwXyNTUNeFSkR9_b9g2NB6ift-J5By3MyjgiorE326VuJhub79fnA_JUB_87vNT5PXoRwuVrKoKsJSbfRa0TrdrJKJPvPCOWQw2CxbAzYyNA6EmoeUVYcdiWrUtZxjJ2MnUTArZROcJUVkWFtb69iHEvlWuEcz25PlGfwHZ7BYkb-twsL33sJtSItGevhVaIGRnv_ocgqkTaUncSomnIpu7uiyxkaeHJTdrh8iffJ5RdiYo5hf365or9yzTtH2v6376lyLF8hwkR3N_064-oCJ-H4=&c=_KYm-dLi4OGGL0yTEfNaKkZDSTXHUe4mATDZKzZjgCXI-mdeVccy6Q==&ch=Z1IvKNsmgC2XIhSDd6D5n8DMbwaSML5WjYKyJhWKTsRzWbdwncqviA==)

Martha McSally

This is New York City’s last opportunity to have a Republican voice in Congress.

He also knows that a vote for Max Rose is a vote to keep Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and the Socialist Squad empowered to pass their radical agenda including socialized medicine and the Green New Deal. body:

We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,** | Peter - My Democrat opponent's fundraising numbers are out, and they're BIG. subject: Taking the fight to Trump
body:
Watch new ads including "Vote Joe" with Lin-Manuel Miranda

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=9c578d562e4043c98ad87e08ce83fe5d&_e=Z2v00W0Wp4E6YRccd2nBK5A9RKswUITLi9HHWetbPMJhEn2XLsotzACL3eqSFSIbZVSMd1uhNe8tUxT01tKzBVNnmsKO8u8VQRcf2SHSTXlfV2M0XvUcnQ9nbW3t8duNtLKEp7JSZwhFj19q_oE3jcBz9PKCKaBb-0vQMuBcDh5MHZZQ0F9e4ie7ku7T8uQ0WDwzMFfgR_zfKb7O0XrrblaN55B6hd206quMo8iZXHX5Go_m8B0gsH8s-umYEb3XY6icB0bnmrHaCKRKnSNhqg%3D%3D) Friend,

With three weeks left until Election Day, the stakes are higher than ever -- and Mike is still in this fight.

In September, Mike committed to spending up to $100 million to run ads, fight voter suppression, and build a COVID-19-responsible ground game to help Joe Biden win the key state of Florida. Florida is a critical battleground where voting has already started -- with over 1.7 million ballots cast, and more coming in every day. Florida also counts their mail-in votes ahead of election day, meaning the media could confidently call the state for Joe Biden on election night and shut down Trump's ability to undermine our democracy by falsely declaring victory.

We wanted to share the latest ads Mike has helped put on the airwaves, starting with the Spanish-language message "Vote Joe," produced in partnership with United for Progress and featuring actor, composer, lyricist, and "Hamilton" creator Lin-Manuel Miranda. [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=9c578d562e4043c98ad87e08ce83fe5d&_e=Z2v00W0Wp4E6YRccd2nBK-gtGziMX6e6_DqmjkW52lbp_Pfv5KImizYXm5QhEOpCpZEMdnhveSZXiCCU9fXGC4cUX0GZnCVxDjPCJMfA46omsZVEK8Kf8kdXINMN9rFf1IOk0V5Mb-e2zwQpa1AsBTbiFRDjfhXHmvHTe4BAkOoI9shd8rl6ZmPotWHNUyjCqqxl-JfyGi7KmmU5hUwqO4cDc4fQz-rG0tdFS4Tfma17VwSMZh9hxushDjQWkToiUVKdsrFg6OVHt5AZdfYAhA%3D%3D) | [WATCH NOW](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=9c578d562e4043c98ad87e08ce83fe5d&_e=Z2v00W0Wp4E6YRccd2nBK-gtGziMX6e6_DqmjkW52lbp_Pfv5KImizYXm5QhEOpCqOB2dYf6vVYblczWJBXcSpYFuwlk8J7gNcGl-ypVSsM8JsvXT1SbL3Pdn2xI9DR0AbyiSG6CM60Go53_a6MGX3O0gHI06W0SPgcNpe1dCEX8Tr254cG0YfqQQFzgYzmjrJrROKMpI-AhFe_vk8u3ce9iwjpuM9Tbj_VPexdxbvvsH74sejVWI8FDI-B0Zzqm3PT3NSg_fWODxt-A9U2Gzg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Watch new ads including "Vote Joe" with Lin-Manuel Miranda | Friend, With three weeks left until Election Day, the stakes are higher than ever -- and Mike is still in this fight. In September, Mike committed to spending up to $100 million to run ads, fight voter suppression, and build a COVID-19-responsible ground game to help Joe Biden win the key state of Florida. Florida is a critical battleground where voting has already started -- with over 1.7 million ballots cast, and more coming in every day. Florida also counts their mail-in votes ahead of election day, meaning the media could confidently call the state for Joe Biden on election night and shut down Trump's ability to undermine our democracy by falsely declaring victory. We wanted to share the latest ads Mike has helped put on the airwaves, starting with the Spanish-language message "Vote Joe," produced in partnership with United for Progress and featuring actor, composer, lyricist, and "Hamilton" creator Lin-Manuel Miranda. | "Vote Joe" is one of several new ads made to speak to the most critical issues faced by communities throughout America. Help us stay in this fight by watching and sharing these new ads with voters across the country. showcases Joe Biden's understanding of the economic challenges facing middle-class Americans, and his focus on rebuilding the economy for American workers, small businesses, and families. is a message of hope from vice presidential candidate Kamala Harris. Featuring recordings from her remarks at the Democratic National Convention, she reminds us that "We can heal our nation. It's up to us." The Spanish-language ad looks back at Donald Trump's incompetent and callous response to the deaths and destruction caused when Hurricane Maria slammed in Puerto Rico. Watch and share these new ads to help us reach as many voters as possible, and strengthen the coalition to defeat Donald Trump. What we do in the next 21 days will be critical. Let's stay in it, and get the job done. Thanks, MikeBloomberg.com P.S. -- The most important thing any of us can do to win -- in Florida and across the U.S. -- is to vote. Visit to register, or check your registration today. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- . Mike Bloomberg All content © 2020. All rights reserved.

Thanks to our fleet of grassroots donors, our campaign OUTRAISED Charlie Crist despite all of the money he's received from lobbyists and George Soros. That's why Biden's team is now being forced to deal with us rather than President Trump with just weeks until the election. Now let 's show them how much of a threat we are by outraising Crist at the FINAL public FEC fundraising deadline of the election. == Thank you, == Anna Paulina Luna Air Force Veteran Official Republican Nominee for Congress (FL-13) PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. | | ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS | PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

body:

.

Friend, it's Michelle Steel. This is urgent.

_The FINAL FEC deadline before Election Day is**TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT.**_ After that, our fundraising numbers go public and our opponent will be looking for any opportunity to count us out. The media, pollsters, outside groups, and pundits will use it as a barometer for success.

clean_body: This is urgent. The FINAL FEC deadline before Election Day is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT. After that, our fundraising numbers go public and our opponent will be looking for any opportunity to count us out. . == Friend, it's Michelle Steel. This is urgent. The FINAL FEC deadline before Election Day isTOMORROW at MIDNIGHT. After that, our fundraising numbers go public and our opponent will be looking for any opportunity to count us out. The media, pollsters, outside groups, and pundits will use it as a barometer for success. That's why it's 100% necessary we put up big numbers. We've set a goal -- our most ambitious yet -- to prove, without a shadow of a doubt, the strength of our grassroots movement. == | ==** == == == == 600% MATCHING EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT Inside Elections is calling this race "the most competitive race in all of Orange County" and POLITICO is STILL calling it a toss-up. Right now we're being outspent... by a lot. Reaching our goal will give us the resources to fight back against the Left's attacks and pull ahead in the final stretch. But if we fall short... There's never been more on the line. This seat is the key to flipping the House and stopping Pelosi's socialist agenda in its tracks. This close to Election Day we need all hands on deck. == This could be your last chance to fight, Friend. Thank you, Michelle Steel == == 600% MATCHING EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT == With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. ==** Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress 8907 Warner Ave Suite 222 Huntington Beach, CA 92647 == . | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

[**> >>Chip in $10<<<**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ez9Hgo7qG5oFcgckfNq9MTFcxWSoZQ6Qnuz1uxrRS6mSE-qunp9ILpXHxqKnsxURcRHLtGVSQ3rTzXkiiutcuZaWeoBLVUIpUCKvuZMGckAhMcx2l_Ytw6jAb2xKfw_XOcV6dvVl8k9wZttET5U-XqRV_kyQpyyesCo8uus9EzXOgKhQa6OmWfF9_eIcNewnOoPVhCVqwWvJJTgXgLEF946aK-32E2RTR-x7RVPHE7lIXfXe-A88Mxpr1P5pZp8Ny0Srd3UCCRZDamy1A9ImAtvngIfxoMYRyqo_g0PLmlDHV3_6MpbWWKiSiQgiLX8wVNzC3aWDFp6WTzaqc6tAH_1HzG-lIeXPN8eKRdcVeIuyhL2JD6fXWd6DG4OSyfvke9AMe3rJCPtOqqAUJKY_rHI0s4OlgV2GCeUhrSGVQgBeJx5aBZqQGA==&c=MCVPDzUclttvr1qA-5Ep7xJsWNhYDoPSXOcFiaGJp8p4ocNtGMij-A==&ch=PD-WmNsIC-Ai_cLHxMFRAJE_W6LdGiB-jXSegNxN8oYOqwJIn_i1dg==)

It is all of the small amounts added together that help to rebuild and become strong- I know this because that is what my family did. Right now, you can do the same. You can help rebuild our country through this small amount.
[**> >>Chip in $10<<<**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ez9Hgo7qG5oFcgckfNq9MTFcxWSoZQ6Qnuz1uxrRS6mSE-qunp9ILpXHxqKnsxURcRHLtGVSQ3rTzXkiiutcuZaWeoBLVUIpUCKvuZMGckAhMcx2l_Ytw6jAb2xKfw_XOcV6dvVl8k9wZttET5U-XqRV_kyQpyyesCo8uus9EzXOgKhQa6OmWfF9_eIcNewnOoPVhCVqwWvJJTgXgLEF946aK-32E2RTR-x7RVPHE7lIXfXe-A88Mxpr1P5pZp8Ny0Srd3UCCRZDamy1A9ImAtvngIfxoMYRyqo_g0PLmlDHV3_6MpbWWKiSiQgiLX8wVNzC3aWDFp6WTzaqc6tAH_1HzG-lIeXPN8eKRdcVeIuyhL2JD6fXWd6DG4OSyfvke9AMe3rJCPtOqqAUJKY_rHI0s4OlgV2GCeUhrSGVQgBeJx5aBZqQGA==&c=MCVPDzUclttvr1qA-5Ep7xJsWNhYDoPSXOcFiaGJp8p4ocNtGMij-A==&ch=PD-WmNsIC-Ai_cLHxMFRAJE_W6LdGiB-jXSegNxN8oYOqwJIn_i1dg==)
$10 can help keep Conservative leadership afloat. $10 can help keep the American Dream alive. $10 can help keep the citizens of our great country safe from the dark inner-workings of the Radical Left.

Thank you for your support, patriot!

Marco Rubio

subject: The Battalion
body:
The silent majority is more vocal than ever
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yqYqpny2RTPIy4R8Asnc2K4MxmHnADJ5_YYHmrfblOQjfxw4wjdIFWfTnCeztqKOR__cZSDndVX3QIf8TS5XiBNdlV2YQoCc_22zJYqNsX8c-cesh6ax8XlxhcgymIcXWaW2grOWxvgyPlHzYYR3De0aHup2OcxAAtjxTyL54JdWD6JA0PjJ6A==&c=hIhbSYCSSC574yHuKUrNNuh-hQ0-_hwkdLQPjQIo-8dBOHiA4M_hQw==&ch=gthiBjUn8lOjSdRI5JOpgSHigVRHEsKPQV4sIMnv4EiueqiSOh9d3A==)

| Patriot,

clean_body: This campaign has to report our final fundraising totals tomorrow... and we’re still short of our $230,000 goal. | | | Patriot, This campaign has to report our final fundraising totals tomorrow... and we’re still short of our $230,000 goal. I know you won’t let me down. I know you won’t let this campaign come up short. This campaign has defied everyone’s expectations... and on Election Day, we will win. Right now, my team is working tirelessly to reach every single voter in our district... knocking on doors, phone-banking, putting out yard signs, you name it. But we still have a massive amount of work to do if we’re going to win. $230,000 will help us seal the deal. Thanks for your help! name: Jay Inslee
subject: Voters start voting this week. Here's how we reach them:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
It's the final stretch -- but we can't stop now.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8189%2E868730%2E9WZE6j) Friend, This week, we start to vote in Washington state. Washington state has led the nation in vote-by-mail, so we're used to an election "season" versus an election "day." But with voting about to begin, we have to reach voters _right now_. Luckily, my campaign ads went up recently on TV and online across the state. But now, we need the funds to keep them up on air: This is the final stretch, and my opponent, Loren Culp, went up last week with his first ad that is misleading about me and my record, while downplaying his extreme viewpoints and divisive rhetoric. _With an opponent like that, we can't predict what's going to come next -- we have to be prepared._ **[We need to raise $50,000 by Friday's FINAL mid-month deadline of this campaign: Will you donate $5 or more today to ensure our message is reaching Washington voters as they begin voting?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12844?t=4&akid=8189%2E868730%2E9WZE6j)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12845?t=5&akid=8189%2E868730%2E9WZE6j)

body:
We can't win this election without you.

Dear Friend,

Doug Collins is fighting back against the radical Democrats. Just yesterday Doug introduced a resolution to push for the removal of Nancy Pelosi as House Speaker. (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/rep-doug-collins-resolution-pelosi-removal-house-speaker)

Doug has a serious record of defending President Trump against the Democrats. But while Doug was working hard to defend our President, Kelly Loeffler and her husband gave thousands to Maxine Waters and other pro-choice, pro-gun control Democrats. (https://www.therealkellyloeffler.com/loefflerrecord/democratdonor)

The election is only a few weeks away and we need to make sure Doug Collins - the only Trump Defender in this race - wins in November. We need your help!

Help Team Collins and volunteer to make calls toda (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/volunteer) y! (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/volunteer)

Sincerely,

Will Smith

Political Director
Collins for Senate, Inc.

** WATCH: Doug Collins Blasts Pelosi on Fox and Friends (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qk-1aez_qCY)
Pelosi's 25th Amendment Bill 'Pandering to Liberal Base'
http://https//www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qk-1aez_qCY
For the full video click here! (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qk-1aez_qCY)
------------------------------------------------------------

**
Stop by our Field Office in Gainesville!
------------------------------------------------------------
Our Gainesville field office is open! We're offering remote phone-banking as well as curb-side pickup of yard signs, bumper stickers, and all your favorite Collins for Senate items!

Address: 505 Green St. Gainesville, GA 30501

To schedule a pickup, or learn about how you can help the campaign by phone-banking remotely, please email: copelan@dougforgeorgia.com

**
Team Collins on the Campaign Trail
------------------------------------------------------------

All aboard the Trump Train in St. Marys! Georgians are ready to give President Donald J. Trump 4 more years!

What a great way to spend a Saturday evening at the Breast Cancer Awareness FastTrack Race in Toccoa. Thank you to everyone's hard work supporting this important cause!
Whether it's joining Doug at an upcoming event, contacting voters, or putting up a yard sign, we need your help! Visit our website (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins) or call us at 404-549-9584

============================================================

Friend, **Pelosi is trying to use billionaire cash to _BUY_ victory here in central Virginia.** Abigail Spanberger has been raking in shocking amounts of money all year, and she’s unloading that cash every day on negative ads against Nick. On top of that, **the Pelosi-controlled Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee has spent over a million dollars _on this race_ _alone_** , trying to tear down Nick’s approval ratings and distract voters from the Democrats’ left-wing agenda. Nick doesn’t rely on outside billionaires and D.C. insiders to fund his campaign because he’s not running to represent someone else’s agenda in Congress. Friend, **Nick is running to represent you.** That’s why we’ve got an army of grassroots supporters just like you. _**And that’s why our campaign enjoyed strong fundraising results during the 3 rd quarter of this year.**_ To keep this surge going and continue spreading our message of liberty, prosperity, and security, _**we’ve got to stand together with just 21 days until the election.**_ _**[FAST donate with 21 DAYS LEFT>>>](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=0b30e453bb9649b9b497ceeb9278387a&_e=yXj0cSGFXkvN-g-w-3RSoo3O1NYL0_zaY4zGfodIXHQZSyNceS4jqNzrpB4tfHyCyuJniNh1gs7f0ocKY_iYHWmFoPw9rq38j-n-R-WquUFvt0K__ziMfwd9dnoCR0TsiHIdUs6J7cMvaZS0IrQb5Kxc6ikmwHnMv6WAh8pvTrxQBgU2dd2WABNcgwlPTiDODCR_6En8lZnmVj0qcJ74ZwsKNn7qPdJX2eMNMsVVnyXNr2UZZyWPv1ZPS_88n5cfVNxL6KTaNY1lY27-rmzZ97AJArZSvFv1LbcMyYad3Y8tZdekGYFgk49l93tWg-gRl2siJaN8Dxoc__iB4unBTf1rjDbqPSO69KppcNNp1P9__P5B9bxcfDbBdIm2kyw7OLpcXyxNObGNlEYGDXL9yaHeveDslaQjDHXpsIU42aQsmKBTo2SvBOiO3K_ntKUb)**_ Nick fought overseas because he never runs away from a fight. clean_body: Friend, Pelosi is trying to use billionaire cash to BUY victory here in central Virginia. Abigail Spanberger has been raking in shocking amounts of money all year, and she’s unloading that cash every day on negative ads against Nick. On top of that, the Pelosi-controlled Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee has spent over a million dollars on this race alone , trying to tear down Nick’s approval ratings and distract voters from the Democrats’ left-wing agenda. Nick doesn’t rely on outside billionaires and D.C. insiders to fund his campaign because he’s not running to represent someone else’s agenda in Congress. Friend, Nick is running to represent you. That’s why we’ve got an army of grassroots supporters just like you. And that’s why our campaign enjoyed strong fundraising results during the 3 rd quarter of this year. To keep this surge going and continue spreading our message of liberty, prosperity, and security, we’ve got to stand together with just 21 days until the election. Nick fought overseas because he never runs away from a fight. Now that battle is in Washington, D.C., and he’s ready to lead the charge for limited government and the God-given freedoms recognized by our Constitution. That’s a stark contrast to Congresswoman Spanberger, who votes in lockstep with Nancy Pelosi over 91% of the time and has shown she can’t be trusted to stop the socialist assault being waged on the Commonwealth of Virginia. It isn’t just us, Friend. Last week, President Trump gave Nick his complete and total endorsement and confirmed Nick as a warrior for VA-07 and your 2A rights! Don’t let Nick and President Trump down! Stay in the fight! Team Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

| | Peter --

**We just got some bad news.**

Mike Garcia released his fundraising numbers from last quarter, and he _outraised_ us. By a lot.

**[We need to close this gap immediately. [Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bf38/29776869/8a43a9c/569e3281/934043553/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMTNfb3V0cmFpc2VkX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201013_outraised_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bf38/29776869/8a43a9c/569e3284/934043553/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMTNfb3V0cmFpc2VkX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201013_outraised_in")
According to Mike's campaign, he raised twice as much as we did between July and September. All the special interests that he's been serving (instead of the people of CA-25) have rushed to fill his coffers. That means he's going into the final weeks of this general election with an advantage -- **he'll have more money to put into ads spreading lies about Christy's record, and we won't have the resources we need to fight back if we don't act fast.**

Now, we always knew Mike was likely to raise more than us because he takes money from corporate PACs and D.C. lobbyists. Christy doesn't -- because she refuses to be bought by special interests.

We don't have to outraise Garcia to win this race, but we can't afford a 2:1 disadvantage. **We need to close this gap right away, and that'll only happen with your help.**

**[Chip in $5 or more immediately to stand with Christy, close this fundraising gap, and send Mike packing>> ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bf38/29776869/8a43a9c/569e3284/934043553/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMTNfb3V0cmFpc2VkX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201013_outraised_in")**

Team Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bf38/29776869/8a43a9c/569e3284/934043553/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMTNfb3V0cmFpc2VkX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201013_outraised_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bf38/29776869/8a43a9c/569e3284/934043553/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDEwMTNfb3V0cmFpc2VkX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010_email_christy?refcode=em20_201013_outraised_in")

subject: Jackie showing signs of nervousness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Pat is calling Jackie out of hiding. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=49cb0c8cac&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Jackie sees what we all see – the defection of support from those who once placed their trust in her.

In case you missed the article in this past [Sunday’s South Bend Tribune about the IN02 race,](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8efd22b1c7&e=5886ca081d) Jackie was asked tough questions about her votes being aligned with her corporate PAC contributors. Her campaign manager and spokesperson became thin-skinned and defensive.

We have more bad news for Jackie, our People-powered campaign is dismantling her autocratic control.

* **Ninety-five (95%) of our contributions in the second quarter were from individuals compared to Jackies’s forty-nine (49%). **

* **Eighty one percent (81%) of our contributions during the second quarter were from Indiana compared to Jackie’s thirty-five percent (35%).**

* **People we’ve called have told us even though they’ve always voted Repubican, Pat has their vote this year.**

* **Besides being featured in the New York Times, Time Magazine, NBC news, The National Catholic Reporter, and other national news, Pat has been endorsed by former Presidential candidate Pete Buttigieg, U.S. Sen. Joe Donnelly, the National Education Association, and more than a dozen other regional city leaders and national organizations.**

Jackie is nervous because she’s realizing that a People-powered campaign like ours has the power to restore to our imagination what the great experiment of democracy is all about – that we can be governed as Thomas Jefferson said, **“by reason and truth,”** and that the foundation of our country’s creed – **government of the people, for the people, by the people – is not lost.**

Pat is not afraid to hold Jackie accountable for her abysmal record, her reckless votes, and her dereliction of duty as a sitting congresswoman. Pat is calling Jackie out of hiding.

[**We need your help. We need to keep Pat up on television. Will you contribute to send a message to Jackie that this People-powered campaign is not intimidated by her?**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=63758f7a93&e=5886ca081d)

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: It's Time To Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

**Early voting begins today!** And we need your help to bring new leadership to Texas' 7th Congressional District. Every vote counts, and by supporting Team Hunt at the ballot box, you can help ensure Houstonians have a seat at the table in Washington, DC.

In this time of great division, we need leaders in Washington who will step up to protect the values that created the greatest nation in the history of the world. My family has dedicated our lives to serving and protecting not just our fellow citizens, but the ideals that empower each of us to live the American Dream. That American Dream must continue to exist, not just for my two young daughters, but for all of our children.

Houston is a unique and dynamic city, and we must protect our way of life. That means protecting the energy industry from Washington bureaucrats who want to make our energy sector more like that of California. It means ensuring that the incredible quality of care provided by our healthcare workers at the Medical Center and hospitals throughout Houston is affordable for every Texan. And it means providing the resources and leadership to work on both short- and long-term solutions to the threat of flooding. I'll be a Congressman who works on solving problems, not one who backs up the gridlock and partisan politics in Washington.

In 2018, Lizzie Fletcher promised that she would be a moderate willing to work across the aisle. Unfortunately, she broke her promise, voting with Nancy Pelosi and Democratic leadership over 99% of the time, supporting dangerous energy policies that kill Houston jobs, and backing a tax agenda that raises taxes on middle class Americans.

As your next Congressman, I will bring your voice back to Washington.

I hope I can count on your support at the ballot box as we approach November 3rd.

You can find helpful information regarding polling locations [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=683e6e882efe41b3b896896c68465fa5&_e=LO3umb5cRBcTRW9BD_-vsW1sooszHL2vx6yBAhNI9hYKa9wkfzflPSD15rEPDI-ucdRL9EUtcgWWYmz7MVUL7dvr1fAGE4Eq7iyXXsvumx5lW_hpXAJdcHgNEHiuE8UN3NtDIjQ8XioeKDmVUFWD8f9n9tgkCgFtgWkdMVX7JSQ6I7ThjlNC9ILQZbZDF-hQppILUerNIRUjW44wcC-850AVf_1Z588lIHx6aQk0gykEjxFcGDn2U0BB48WyM2qfLVvvUGbVwaKyQK2hT9hxYf57KkaaH6JB0C5Uk2wN1-0%3D).

If you'd like a yard sign, please email us at info@wesleyfortexas.com to request your sign today.

Thank you,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

subject: Your vote is at risk
body:
| | |
