| | | Fellow Conservative, What could be more important than stopping election fraud? Or safeguarding the Electoral College to keep our elections Constitutional? Yet the progressive left is pushing strongly for proposals at the federal and state levels that would endanger our system of free and fair elections as envisioned by America’s founders. They want to abolish the Electoral College so that giant progressive cities like New York, Los Angeles, Seattle, Chicago, and San Francisco have more weight in electing the U.S. president. They want to allow illegal immigrants to vote. They want same-day voter registration. Universal mail-in ballots. And perhaps worst, “ballot harvesting” so that “ballot harvesters” collect limitless ballots from senior citizens and others. These “vote harvesters” are trusted to take the ballots to the polls without tampering. These schemes are ripe for voter fraud, and a violation of free, fair, constitutional elections. Such “reforms” are designed to tilt power to progressives and change our elections and our government. But The Heritage Foundation is already moving to counter them. As a friend of Heritage, you need to know our recommendations. Please let me send you the free Ebook, **["Mandate for Leadership: Ensuring the Integrity of Our Election System."](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byax6Yn_Pu_mfIMu89KzuN4N4H6sHQun_9F3hySt1i4EXGhRNEApsvwdEWtDkkGopiMO9XEWLehCt84A5HDp50BMQrjpjrkw8-Qu-ltnzSMv9sVZe9li22sadPDvhlWbjTRlqXM8XzgJorx-HdyS_Hc6UN9zBsz6DTBw3XHyhHLSyNF6ACfwKUw4Z1kvVAa_xjXyw8b4iqFY2_nvu1-m-gHdtjC0edqG4aZ5nnKmxVsXVb6PIJST6OvE6YGCzOQxkERZ9MGZxv4XDJ6iWeUcRNCE2w6G6s5F7DLIxrknQqTveYHV80nCahPw0o5w-P9-5WKufhFGv8_AWo7_OWKTIvIq3s72HxwoXBdumPEf87Y=&c=dMvZ6_CQpcy5elsB3_Up_0zTtvvevc52w-eyXyPWP70DBHv4HZwb8w==&ch=cxq1yxl_vElhdJ20p5Zfwx1WRsahcPdqnnBGI4Mnadbs-Zkhqzdrrg==)** This eBook will inform and encourage you about the effort to protect our elections this year and into the future. You will learn the 9 dangerous proposals from the left, and about 7 safeguards proposed by Heritage. There is too much at stake not to be informed. Please use the link below to instantly access your copy of this essential eBook now. **[https://www.askheritage.org/mandateforleadership-election-ebook/](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001byax6Yn_Pu_mfIMu89KzuN4N4H6sHQun_9F3hySt1i4EXGhRNEApsvwdEWtDkkGopiMO9XEWLehCt84A5HDp50BMQrjpjrkw8-Qu-ltnzSMv9sVZe9li22sadPDvhlWbjTRlqXM8XzgJorx-HdyS_Hc6UN9zBsz6DTBw3XHyhHLSyNF6ACfwKUw4Z1kvVAa_xjXyw8b4iqFY2_nvu1-m-gHdtjC0edqG4aZ5nnKmxVsXVb6PIJST6OvE6YGCzOQxkERZ9MGZxv4XDJ6iWeUcRNCE2w6G6s5F7DLIxrknQqTveYHV80nCahPw0o5w-P9-5WKufhFGv8_AWo7_OWKTIvIq3s72HxwoXBdumPEf87Y=&c=dMvZ6_CQpcy5elsB3_Up_0zTtvvevc52w-eyXyPWP70DBHv4HZwb8w==&ch=cxq1yxl_vElhdJ20p5Zfwx1WRsahcPdqnnBGI4Mnadbs-Zkhqzdrrg==)** Regards, Kay C. They want to allow illegal immigrants to vote. They want same-day voter registration. Universal mail-in ballots. And perhaps worst, “ballot harvesting” so that “ballot harvesters” collect limitless ballots from senior citizens and others. These “vote harvesters” are trusted to take the ballots to the polls without tampering. These schemes are ripe for voter fraud, and a violation of free, fair, constitutional elections. Such “reforms” are designed to tilt power to progressives and change our elections and our government. But The Heritage Foundation is already moving to counter them. As a friend of Heritage, you need to know our recommendations. Please let me send you the free Ebook, == This eBook will inform and encourage you about the effort to protect our elections this year and into the future. You will learn the 9 dangerous proposals from the left, and about 7 safeguards proposed by Heritage. There is too much at stake not to be informed. Please use the link below to instantly access your copy of this essential eBook now. == Regards, Kay C. James President == | | The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002 | | The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE, Washington, DC 20002 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: They want to "pack the hell out of it"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Yesterday the Senate began the confirmation hearings for Judge Amy Coney Barrett, and the Democrats quickly made it into a political game per usual. Rather than focusing on an independent judiciary's merits, they focused on partisan attacks meant to politicize the Supreme Court - that is what is on the ballot this November. [**Donate $17.76 to protect our Constitution from the left 's radical agenda. **](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/763ZStirvHipZreaS5QId5vA/aXuZ7BDMiZi1nsBJge3Hig) Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have refused to say whether they would pack the court - even though they have made statements supporting it in the past. **And my own opponent, Nate McMurray, in a tweet last week said, "pack the hell out of it."** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/763ZStirvHipZreaS5QId5vA/aXuZ7BDMiZi1nsBJge3Hig) The health of democracy depends on an independent court, but they don't care about our court or the Constitution - they are dead set on accomplishing their radical agenda, and they'll change or break the rules to do it. We cannot let them win. Our democracy, our Constitution, our second amendment rights, public safety, and our way of life are on the ballot in November, and there is a very clear choice of who will protect them. That's why I have started my patriot defense fund for my most dedicated supporters so we can send a strong message through November 3rd that we care about the future of our nation. [Can I count on you to join?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/763ZStirvHipZreaS5QId5vA/aXuZ7BDMiZi1nsBJge3Hig) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/763ZStirvHipZreaS5QId5vA/aXuZ7BDMiZi1nsBJge3Hig) Let's protect the sacred tradition of our Supreme Court, and let's protect our country from the radical agenda of Nate, Biden, and Kamala. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/SNrynbKkhai9okNsG892qiOQ/aXuZ7BDMiZi1nsBJge3Hig) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/o8M763QzHfNtskD8n3TjdH5w/aXuZ7BDMiZi1nsBJge3Hig)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Opinion: Trump Has Lowered Costs and Increased Medicare Options by Favoring Market Competition
body:
"The results are in: America’s seniors today enjoy a stronger program that offers more and better benefits at lower costs," Seema Verma writes | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25e121c9e5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Opinion: Trump Has Lowered Costs and Increased Medicare Options by Favoring Market Competition**

“For almost four years, President Donald Trump has promoted reforms to Medicare that favor market competition over Washington meddling,” Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services Administrator Seema Verma writes in the _Houston Chronicle._

“The results are in: America’s seniors today enjoy a stronger program that offers more and better benefits at lower costs . . . Combined, beneficiaries have saved approximately $3.4 billion in Medicare Advantage and Part D premium costs since 2017.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28f939f4b9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Democrats on the Senate Judiciary Committee devoted their opening statements on the Supreme Court nomination of Judge Amy Coney Barrett to repeating a shameless lie. Why can’t they share their real reasons for opposing her?” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “It was all cover for the gripe Democrats don’t dare make publicly: that Barrett won’t be an activist justice.” Read more in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ceae8fa55&e=3ee4985eea).

**MORE:**[**Democrats’ Damning Confusion Over Barrett and Obamacare**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05f089bda3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “U.S. small business confidence rose last month to its highest since the onset of the coronavirus pandemic earlier this year with more firms experiencing an uptick in foot traffic and sales . . . The index has rebounded sharply as restrictions imposed on businesses and consumers to contain the spread of COVID-19 have continued easing,” [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8cd43180b&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|
---
| “Past vaccines have taken a decade or longer to develop, and more than half over the past 20 years have failed during clinical trials. But four vaccine candidates have entered the last phase of clinical trials,” Allysia Finley writes. “Technological breakthroughs that were already in progress got a boost from a bureaucratic one in May, when the Trump administration launched ‘Operation Warp Speed.’” Read more in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bcbd84ecc&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39476b5b1b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5930d743db&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=87c41d9d25)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Gary Peters
subject: Our last FEC deadline (please read) >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan
Hi there --
If we lose in Michigan, we'll lose our only chance at taking back the Senate for Democrats. That's why this news is so troubling:
**Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are funneling in millions to defeat me, hell-bent on buying Michigan 's Senate seat. And now, a brand-new poll from the New York Times shows me only ONE POINT ahead of my far-right opponent.**
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. But my far-right opponent has outraised me time and time again, and Michiganders are already casting their ballots by the thousands.
Look, our last FEC filing deadline is on Wednesday night, and with Senate control on the line, we cannot be outraised again. **Here's the big news: a group of donors has offered to MATCH every donation between now and our deadline up to $500,000.** So I'm counting on your immediate contribution:

| And that's just the start! Check out the full list of endorsements [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7-sza6a5PiLfOa7FXnIMRoMXb3wXKhsMedtM8cszJBP_bg41C6bsvtE0IoTf0b5YpW2hlF6Ma692guRhdbOpEaMWWFA3O5NciDv02vJNkk-HTCdpb_qgqC_5fpqZN4Ax25yXPZRP56g4lVPzPoj63RU-V8E4g6Son4bvuPZMBM=&c=qLHimUHyPE818-KWHvymCa8A-zNWdL4iI9D_9m-9sx1Pa_3Oec8ncQ==&ch=ZOdWiGBPNtZaE7vYTT5ii9YRYwcNz__Lkl0MdxUBKCl3YdhfNv23RQ==).
Kat has many supporters across the state and country thanks to her hard work and complete devotion to the well-being of the people of Florida.
Even President Trump has voiced his support for Kat and called her "an incredible leader for Florida!"

body:
.
I am reaching out on behalf of my friend, Bruce Westerman, who currently represents Arkansas's 4th district in the House of Representatives.

Friend,

I am reaching out on behalf of my friend, Bruce Westerman, who currently represents Arkansas's 4th district in the House of Representatives.

Bruce and I have stood shoulder to shoulder to protect your shared conservative values in the halls of the Congress. Bruce is a strong advocate of the American First Agenda, the 2nd Amendment, border security, fair trade deals, and standing up to China. It is critical that we send Bruce back to Washington so he can continue in this important fight with me to preserve our conservative principles and the American way of life.

Bruce has always strived to put hard working Arkansans first by fighting for the issues they value: low taxes, limiting government, and reforming our healthcare system. His leadership in the House proves why we must keep him there. **_We need more members like Bruce Westerman in Congress. I am proud to support his re-election._[Will you join me in supporting Bruce today?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lRtrnNUimjjof_4lMB_SjLl5MUTn1MP9yLlZ6hgcAPz-84OAmDzFkr8fS0_VN-r02C2yZQmjyzaLzv_did3VRl4DN8SR8DrVaz7ZAnf0lMkmD4sNrAYF79NpE6irYsWlgf3wGs5GLXMtMQSMAqts5iDcGpN_QbQlhptSCPtJCAk3ZM3n7TBwDYumzfCuBu7tK0kjnc7Nk3x9Lva54niSw8Oidd5H5BlYr5_lQf9oJ_kyKDG6zlQZB-Vli-_ii4yMbFKlmIJulO_2MJ2Wru1rcM0Y5OzEE4wyLqSSI_-XYCidttgayHsLKgWibHJ1xYypnFvAU5pITVb_NDd8guU7C5hJzD2HN2B6Xt23hqMau8g77HS7eDfPy1HMV-8_8hTVIoJlwoHcJbd8BqG5mdTC6KS-I4wtL2SAODQacss2XQGcU_Xh0oUW9g==&c=us9t_-12agDujG2D4e621yTvfE7fcWD-6zXmHVd0fMGVb0dQuO-J-A==&ch=EDnFDV5KOup4WfsoU0DjVRhUmiZLeM2fPQw0Y14taYPZJVmTxDswIQ==)**

| Dear Friends, There are many reasons why we need to re-take the majority in the state Senate but here are three important ones:
1. Stop the Democrats from creating an income tax that will hurt working families.
2. Stop the Democrats from taxing small businesses out of business.
3. Stop the Democrats from continuing to block federal grants for charter schools that would give parents and their children more educational opportunities.

body:

For the past 17 years, the Human Rights Campaign has released scorecards that measure every Member of Congress' support for LGBTQ rights based on voting history.
We're **proud** that, once again, Linda Sanchez has received a **_Perfect Score! _**
As the Vice Chair of the Congressional LGBTQ+ Equality Caucus, Linda is a dedicated champion of equal rights for _all_ \-- no matter one's race, ethnicity, religion, gender, _or_ sexual orientation.
**Now, she 's up for re-election in just three short weeks! [Will you make sure Linda can keep fighting for equality in Congress by chipping in anything you can today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q7viDjZAJJMd13mEO4iQ2-oIBa-xOUun5-IgNdlxUds=/oYUTxJ6pADlxlY198FyRhua62s_6ReAW56MLTdvuiLI=?refcode=X_101320_HRC)**

Between Supreme Court Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito's renewed threats against gay marriage and President Trump's _extremely_ conservative SCOTUS nominee, LGBTQ rights are hanging in the balance.
This November, we **need** to elect leaders who are _unwavering_ in their support of true equality for all.
[**Help us ensure that Linda is the one representing CA-38 values in Congress for the next two years >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q7viDjZAJJMd13mEO4iQ2-oIBa-xOUun5-IgNdlxUds=/oYUTxJ6pADlxlY198FyRhua62s_6ReAW56MLTdvuiLI=?refcode=X_101320_HRC)

Thank you!!
_\-- Team Sanchez_

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark's final debate is TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Tune in tonight at 7pm.
|
---

| | Derek,

Tonight, Mark Warner will take the stage for his final debate with his GOP opponent. This is the _People 's Debate_, sponsored by the American Association of Retired Persons (AARP). **Tune in:[watch the livestream on WTKR's Facebook page](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da59/53d9897e/55a353d3/1c88f54f/22204099/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/WTKR3/live")**, or check your local TV listings. Mark is fired up and ready to talk about his record of building economic security and defending our health care in the Senate. Mark has the track record to prove he'll protect our health care: he's worked hard to defend the Affordable Care Act (ACA), lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand access to medical services like telemedicine.

On the other hand, Mark's opponent has already promised to be a rubber stamp for the Trump administration's attacks on Virginians' health care and called the ACA a "bad bill."

There's a clear choice -- but we need your help to keep this campaign going strong.

This is the People 's Debate, sponsored by the American Association of Retired Persons (AARP). Tune in: "", or check your local TV listings. Mark is fired up and ready to talk about his record of building economic security and defending our health care in the Senate. Mark has the track record to prove he'll protect our health care: he's worked hard to defend the Affordable Care Act (ACA), lower the cost of prescription drugs, and expand access to medical services like telemedicine. On the other hand, Mark's opponent has already promised to be a rubber stamp for the Trump administration's attacks on Virginians' health care and called the ACA a "bad bill." name: Greg Stanton
subject: TONIGHT: Tune-In To Watch My Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

We're less than twenty five days away from the election and we know how critically important these next few weeks are to making sure we win in November. I have been working hard to make sure I get my message out to voters and discussing my vision for improving the lives of Arizonans.

Tonight, my opponent Dave Giles and I will join PBS, KJZZ, and the Arizona Republic to debate the issues important to Arizonans. The broadcasts will air at 5pm and 10pm AZ Time on Arizona PBS.

[**I hope you can tune-in and support my campaign with a contribution to help me finish strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FSt_EOq3Hg2vxZJbxIQhXo5Wh7u37UAffMEaALWWMRQ=/QheW2ziUnAK0DCRLbIN4DH1CJCdGGUFzdJ3wojDdADM=?refcode=X_101320_Debate_A)

Any amount is appreciated and no donation is too small. **[Can you rush a contribution of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can to make sure I have the resources necessary to win in November?](https://act.myngp.com/el/FSt_EOq3Hg2vxZJbxIQhXo5Wh7u37UAffMEaALWWMRQ=/QheW2ziUnAK0DCRLbIN4DH1CJCdGGUFzdJ3wojDdADM=?refcode=X_101320_Debate_A)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:

body:
We know that Hoosier Republicans will stand behind President Trump and Senate Republicans as they fulfill their constitutional responsibilities. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/elections-powered-by-you-469810?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=daa63c5330&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b22b2bf4b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

The Supreme Court confirmation hearings for our fellow Hoosier, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, are underway.

By nominating Judge Barrett, President Donald Trump is fulfilling his constitutional duty and following this week's confirmation hearing for Judge Barrett, there should be no question of her qualifications to serve on the Supreme Court. Throughout each step of her career, Judge Barrett has won the admiration and respect of peers across the ideological spectrum. [\--> Click Here to Watch Judge Amy Coney Barrett's Opening Statement <\-- ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0e3060d372&e=1acd9bb3d6) **Judge Barrett is fully qualified to serve on our nation's highest court, but Democrats will stop at nothing to try to discredit her nomination. The media and Democrats have even stooped so low as to attack her family and faith!**

**That’s why we’re sending you this note: [Will you help us make sure that fellow Hoosier Amy Coney Barrett is nominated to the Supreme Court by donating $5, $10, $25, $50 or $100 today?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c01e894894&e=1acd9bb3d6)** [-> Click Here to Support Judge Amy Coney Barrett <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0eca5f0020&e=1acd9bb3d6) It is the duty of President Donald Trump and the Senate to fill a Supreme Court seat vacancy. We know that Hoosier Republicans will stand behind President Trump and Senate Republicans as they fulfill their constitutional responsibilities.

-Your Indiana Republican Party

clean_body: The Left is terrified of our movement... | Friend, Ilhan Omar calls us racist... ... Nancy Pelosi wants to change the rules to remove President Trump from the White House even after We the People re-elect him in November. As a proud black man who is pro-Trump, the left is terrified of our campaign and this movement. This is the most important election of our lifetime, and our conservative, pro-Trump message is working, but the liberal media won’t tell you that. Our final fundraising reporting deadline is here and it’s our last chance before Election Day to show voters that we have the momentum. To help us reach our goal of $100,000 in the final days before the deadline, we have secured a 4x match for all online donations. President Trump needs proven conservative fighters like me in Congress to go head to head with the Left. We have already watched Nancy Pelosi and her minions hold one bogus hearing after another in their witch hunt impeachment. Now, Nancy Pelosi has introduced a bill to give Congress the power to use the 25th Amendment to OUR Constitution to remove President Trump from office. This dangerous behavior has to stop, and it’s going to take conservatives like me who are ready to stand up to the Left to put an end to it. But to win, I need your help in raising $100,000 in the final days before the deadline. The choice we face as a country is clear. We must elect conservative, pro-business, and pro-police officials that will enact policy that will bring prosperity and order back to America. When the voters send me to Congress, they will be sending someone who is ready to fight alongside President Trump to drain the swamp and Keep America Great. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds Official Republican Nominee for Congress FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Tell the Senate: confirm Amy Coney Barrett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
The Supreme Court is one of our most revered institutions and it should be treated with respect and reverence — not used as a political football... [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=bdf44976a4714456a6cd53c1ef6debfa&_e=Q28P842WZSmcEelRmM5Z14ZceygGRqYEiiYz-4skXwZTR81aYES1pn_cokYhqevihwRlffSPBH1ARoHPKFDW8OTMmrR5_COSeEOUjfKX8UMZUb7Is5mAXWNQsxtJch0LsPUpaT4Jl4J-BnwbXqSf-tEZJfaCFhzijpPd5rAfhdvNty4YquLiZqdnk579D5JpoUQEIKQAo0s8SAFGoqh24MesXH7iF0aftAydK3fT-duX12kFr3lXOdwKL7XXyXMUBALCC7pcZgtlrf1ZFQ2bC3V7VVuqPutJuLhgbgC_iZmmUtDzbXSwvmZzLtAlLeHaIhW_ZCrip0RWRCjKrISdLC8E5y_GgqsA-tclvN8wDj5qzMg-jN5B-7083JRgLHER0LD7piKkyB-xF5kMDhvdjhvgnLyzmms0jOGaDVdJEvzxBva4uuxVvGC4H6i2z3NV-FPZ1A7K42Afv2lJNZbw6UMP6Mzly5CRDyEabZsvsXw%3D) Friend, _Have you been watching the Supreme Court nomination hearings? _
Judge Amy Coney Barrett is a brilliant legal mind, a hard-working mom, and a supremely talented, originalist judge who will make an excellent addition to the Supreme Court.
But that hasn’t stopped the Democrats from using her nomination to play political games. We don’t need another Kavanaugh hearing — the politicization of that process was traumatic and shameful for our entire country.
The Supreme Court is one of our most revered institutions and it should be treated with respect and reverence — not used as a political football. The hearings for well-qualified nominees like Judge Barrett should be sober, thorough, and respectful.
They are an opportunity for the Senate to exercise their Constitutional duty of advise and consent — not a chance to sling mud at political opponents or get a sound bite for cable news.
Unfortunately, the Democrats have already made it clear that they will stop at nothing to block Judge Barrett’s nomination. They have refused to meet with her, launched unfounded and ridiculous attacks, and threatened to pack the Supreme Court and destroy the filibuster if she is confirmed.
This is unacceptable, and frankly outrageous. It’s the continuation of the Kavanaugh strategy — obstruct the nominee at all costs, and if possible, destroy them.
**[Well, I’ve had enough, friend. That’s why I’m reaching out right now — I want you to stand with and tell the Senate: I support confirming Amy Coney Barrett.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=bdf44976a4714456a6cd53c1ef6debfa&_e=Q28P842WZSmcEelRmM5Z14ZceygGRqYEiiYz-4skXwZTR81aYES1pn_cokYhqevihwRlffSPBH1ARoHPKFDW8OTMmrR5_COSeEOUjfKX8UMZUb7Is5mAXWNQsxtJch0LsPUpaT4Jl4J-BnwbXqSf-tEZJfaCFhzijpPd5rAfhdvNty4YquLiZqdnk579D5JpoUQEIKQAo0s8SAFGoqh24MesXH7iF0aftAydK3fT-duX12kFr3lXOdwKL7XXyXMUBALCC7pcZgtlrf1ZFQ2bC6Sh6rQLgMKlVW-82CTadOalLW0DMaacBY6VMbhixj3G8CFMZBg5FB7iFP3yVEkU2CH57zf-ZSKw-PGxb71IsT90bRBRaCtLSY8wzZSfKZE54VFZpUx726pWluFjbpTj51ZtAsHWbx_m2BckHs6dTEqiQgnQCjaVdnT0L3Y2D2CUPsLDlMq3svDNoj5Iubva0dLx10iddS8c0SpzTCuC7XY%3D)**
_Add your name to show the Senate just how many Americans support Amy Coney Barrett's confirmation._ [**Tell the Senate: I support Amy Coney Barrett**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=bdf44976a4714456a6cd53c1ef6debfa&_e=Q28P842WZSmcEelRmM5Z14ZceygGRqYEiiYz-4skXwZTR81aYES1pn_cokYhqevihwRlffSPBH1ARoHPKFDW8OTMmrR5_COSeEOUjfKX8UMZUb7Is5mAXWNQsxtJch0LsPUpaT4Jl4J-BnwbXqSf-tEZJfaCFhzijpPd5rAfhdvNty4YquLiZqdnk579D5JpoUQEIKQAo0s8SAFGoqh24MesXH7iF0aftAydK3fT-duX12kFr3lXOdwKL7XXyXMUBALCC7pcZgtlrf1ZFQ2bC3Ww_L8H3VZCC-Stwrnp5Xg0JdXI7purHKE_GGVa7a2zCNlIZHadGf254ONPMYHAzo7YcRP19KpFiKiKt-1H18sCnna5XmyXkU1l4c3vB6hwak6tWMAxYs-_zAonu1WJvEJxXy9nQHx-_Vw_qxgZckORJrl4Ac8uxLXjLQGCcIR0fO71_frSKY7hM_QyhY56mTDsyZHSI8nk6qnn4KN9zH8%3D) Thank you for reading,

We’re just DAYS away from the election at this point, and we’re on the brink of losing America as we know it. We can’t survive another term with Nancy Pelosi in the Speaker’s Office, and her underlings like Lauren Underwood doing her bidding. **Democrats like Underwood claim to be moderates, but did you know that she votes with Socialist Pelosi 100% of the time? ---
Nancy Pelosi is quietly making a major play for Texas.
---
In an email to her donors, she admitted that the Republican path to take back the House runs right through Texas -- _specifically this district I’m fighting to win back._
---
_That’s why she’s put a target on my back. She even tried to stop me from winning the Republican primary, because she knows I pose a threat to her majority._
---
**Pelosi is now 3x-matching donations to beat me, so I’ll unlock a 5x-match for the next 30 minutes to fight back._She should know better than to target a U.S. Army Captain._**

subject: she called us “Enemies of the State”

body:
Did you see that Nancy Pelosi called all Republicans “Domestic Enemies” and “Enemies of the State”? | |
---
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=d23b077def944d9c9ad54fdc6df2da25&_e=ypvnyImSFjnPohUN3WXoZ4ErQ8WYFhqtVL15Aexr2KZgZicqBmIf9Ov6C058_H2lfj32heS_6_vYH-W8BDjqFJfzzwT2MuIx3QZlcPmWEMF9vG7u06P82AZ8FE_LTP-6Iha4WuhMeMdT8ce7DI7I9Hof6r5mauOw9cV064X--6bnS_3rvh0VMxdL2VyATQ8PhLWjS2O6FCg93D6bftc2qNI3q0BfojywrsVRDyp3EbvzZ7-exL9QUtGRyCU-RxBi6q6fUZyKMrp18nyzFsWwpEVof98OrJfHEjwLeD2F9ddwrQmsPyxdaC_kGyGP8kb4CPlXNeDo5dzWsf3-CL2ox5aIqz8Dreqkwa45eXLeCRbTUDra7ajoQIXkqhEF7NxOhSKF4gc1kTrjaVu2CLiixl9iF8Ije7I-CM8Tq9YcXx8MTMSvGTEkCn7LNBdNfey2)
Peter,

_Did you see that Nancy Pelosi called all Republicans**“Domestic Enemies”** and **“Enemies of the State”**?_

**I would expect this kind of language from a third world dictator, not the Speaker of the House! **

Unfortunately, I’m not surprised by Nancy Pelosi’s language. She has presided over the most divisive and radical Congress in history. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: 7 months, 3 Ws
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We've come a long way together in the seven months since Rhode Island's first COVID-19 case. We've had to adapt to a lot of new rules and a whole new way of living. Despite all that's going on, we still need to focus on getting the basics right. And that means we have to remember the 3 Ws: 1) Wear your mask: Whenever you are in contact with people outside of your household, you should be wearing a cloth face covering. Masks prevent the spread of COVID-19 through airborne particles. Your mask should be made of at least two layers of washable, breathable fabric and should cover your nose and mouth without gaps. Remember, your mask isn't just for your protection -- it keeps you from spreading COVID-19 to those around you.
2) Wash your hands: You should wash your hands often, especially before handling food or touching your face. Use warm water and soap whenever possible, thoroughly scrubbing your whole hand and nailbed for at least 20 seconds. If soap and water aren't available, use hand sanitizer that is at least 60% alcohol.
3) Watch your distance: Remain six feet away from people who are not your household contacts whenever physically possible. The more distance you can create between you and other people, the less likely it is that airborne particles from one person will be able to reach another.
All of these precautions are important, but none of them alone will prevent the spread of COVID-19. We need to make sure that we are doing all three all the time to minimize the risk to ourselves, our family, and our friends. I know that it can be tiring and, at times, frustrating to have to follow these steps. But they are absolutely necessary to our efforts to protect the health of Rhode Islanders and reopen our schools and businesses. For more information on the 3 Ws and the latest COVID-19 guidance, visit [health.ri.gov/covid](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Flm1ZyN7kb-Vgv32qg2lDWUKz7CBRzhqzBSLDz5LRHjuLX-crR3txYpr6O8h0SpWUeywCuzfMn3IIUiMvcYQkxGIwgNAD_87lRpKkWCiQhA6lSxppTmeCBuevMa0_BPup8eLcwoEX1KSaLTUFMVesQ==&c=upX2p8l5AkCAfJCOQ5jXV1Mbzx_3b6k_pRtbCziuqgw0gkN0q8BOxg==&ch=kY4qkuibMG-HoIzYI4Oe1_THsQliEH8VN_H81Gz42etAswoTR6sHSw==).
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Flm1ZyN7kb-Vgv32qg2lDWUKz7CBRzhqzBSLDz5LRHjuLX-crR3txSycAKZL6phuxsgtdzv1cMVjiPAMBmCHvDnJBejhV0_TlATIfB6uT7jI9SIMWgDA2qF0tvb0LCieijAEMW5moRYU2ty58QP169byYVLF856A9zUy35kq6ZYzB2m0aVHU-Ujd5M-C-FdjeoRCJk_eyzkY8qDLozeTtscANSs-dxKoVayZOcRQykh3t7JtBJcEy7FGlzsxI4PFrgFOkLRfjstaG3-TvdVO9pdMVQAvev5iWCB-_-XTOPE_2kxLRt4Y7SVzsQxP1tZF0yimxJdnTjE=&c=upX2p8l5AkCAfJCOQ5jXV1Mbzx_3b6k_pRtbCziuqgw0gkN0q8BOxg==&ch=kY4qkuibMG-HoIzYI4Oe1_THsQliEH8VN_H81Gz42etAswoTR6sHSw==).

subject: Voting has begun 🗳
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

Early Voting began today! We're expecting heavy voter turnout all across the district, so please vote early and don't get stuck in a long Election Day line. If you haven't voted, please [follow this link to find Early Voting locations and times.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=3acac646b2&e=68aaeb0998)

**This is crunch time, and with ballots already being cast, we're running incredibly short on time to reach new voters. **

What that means is that I need your help. [Tomorrow night at midnight is our deadline to raise money for our Pre-Election report.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=ce75a63411&e=68aaeb0998) Between now and then, I need to raise enough money to keep our ads on air and online, and keep our ground game strong through Election Day!

**We're coming down to the end of this fight, and[I'm asking you one more time for your support.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=0f616528d6&e=68aaeb0998)**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $2,800](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=37e02f6f20&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $2,800")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $1,000](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=4fba0d977b&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $1,000")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $500](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=8139c43dab&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $500")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $100](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=add9ddcbf3&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $100")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=e21077ab0f&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE OTHER")
---
| **This race could very well be decided by the time Early Voting is over, so[it is absolutely critical that we raise enough funds by midnight tomorrow](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=243022e942&e=68aaeb0998) **to fund our campaign at 100% through the next two weeks.
---
| I am so honored to have your support, and I cannot wait to serve the incredible people of the 32nd Congressional District.

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

body:

Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=0e0fcf6835b34fd293a851fb260b4c27&_e=eQ6cqYQnChzNm6rjUWuah_x9ujezk8NThGDY1UyRM1qULACB_ZQw2Vz-f2xS_clbdL3RS1FjFlm5UqTtKDwXa9ApFo2qGc-KatkYfMdw_98cCX1ySjNmNJU9Nj3Jw4t1SU6BDw4Py7Q-oNqeHJP7PCQWxaYW932NsO4n9HhN9IavK3ASy1tLjcOB9zgvLPLpsMjGxU2TkfEWg90P-T-eabwnSH0FubdMuiGZQEqYDHjT3kq0klX-JYLPpm_Lm5TtbVN30ODcI6Tw-wAp5iNQMWCMjrkQ4tZ0J8PI3H_s7oxUAsUEjI6fI5Cq04BUUG2NPLLRMBKkM1ljom-pAklZ3A7wTE1EETI1uH5hbsMVsR4UQWyU0Cw79Ovkbepnppfi44des46JBuOL_avODYKIRQ%3D%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=0e0fcf6835b34fd293a851fb260b4c27&_e=eQ6cqYQnChzNm6rjUWuah_x9ujezk8NThGDY1UyRM1qULACB_ZQw2Vz-f2xS_clbdL3RS1FjFlm5UqTtKDwXa9ApFo2qGc-KatkYfMdw_98cCX1ySjNmNJU9Nj3Jw4t1SU6BDw4Py7Q-oNqeHJP7PCQWxaYW932NsO4n9HhN9IavK3ASy1tLjcOB9zgvLPLpJ2VReHTMQy4KYYPJcRRczvZBokPYGIhJUrykJ9sVVhhYwjVaSZvCkcGJrvmCE68fFnUh97Jskv3dNdShrrOrdIeVWGWoth7yzrCHe7x78GEYZj6mvfwzRF1OYIhWI9MbjMvD5XBMa1TnAiS_rnSV28Py8Ur0Ayn05nbDbLuOC2m0wuu8bPPzRBmVyZXIvMa3wxaSuoGgs_JpviKkk6p-fQ%3D%3D)**

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=0e0fcf6835b34fd293a851fb260b4c27&_e=eQ6cqYQnChzNm6rjUWuah_x9ujezk8NThGDY1UyRM1qULACB_ZQw2Vz-f2xS_clbdL3RS1FjFlm5UqTtKDwXa9ApFo2qGc-KatkYfMdw_98cCX1ySjNmNJU9Nj3Jw4t1SU6BDw4Py7Q-oNqeHJP7PCQWxaYW932NsO4n9HhN9IavK3ASy1tLjcOB9zgvLPLpEDA31EQYO691Ja5GNh7K-oT9gl0lbXNz8qqYNs3nvoJ9S430gw2xRFbGnbvSQbC7umotxjSTr8vkVlUmcBdgNkEHzPTYjHlFI0o0NgnxFoxQQxW-xSlxhTHEcuCYz8dmAdqFZYTF7disReyuM8aoU2gPw2q7AXtZHX7ZTGGb2-pI4Sv5e-t-GVi8OJVPHt1yRe03UNa_AcN_ayNtDDipGQ%3D%3D)**

subject: Changing the Narrative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Pat understands what is necessary in this historic time. Jackie is not up to the task. She is reckless and negligent in her duty as a representative. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3a51c7e403&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=4bd5b45107&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,

It’s been a long four years for many of us, and for those of us in IN02, it’s been a long eight years under Jackie Walorski’s incumbency. We have seen the erosion of our Hoosier values and of our economic strength. As a nation, we are more divided now than at any point since the American Civil War. The middle class has become the working poor. Racism and misogyny are not only on the rise, they are proudly on display in the light of day.

It is too easy to wake up feeling any of the following: helpless, discouraged, defeated, tired of “fighting” and/or frustrated by what to do next. I encourage us all not to fall prey to these inclinations. It’s time to change the narrative.

For more than two years, I have accompanied Pat as she has traveled the district meeting and talking with diverse populations of people. I see the faces of Hoosiers who just want to lead a good life, who want to provide and protect their families, and who want to leave the world a little bit better because they are here. We are a community, and we are in relationship with one another.

When people approach me to thank us for the commitment to this work, I always look the person in the eye and say, “We’re going to do this.” What surprises me is the response. “Do you really think so?” And without a beat, I respond confidently and decisively, “Yes.”

[**Yes, the numbers are there. Our path to victory is in sight.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c35b22b83c&e=5886ca081d) How do we achieve that win number? How do we get there? [**We turn out the vote. It’s that simple. The votes are there.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1342444c60&e=5886ca081d) We’re seeing it. Our national advisors see it. Jackie sees it. Why do you think Jackie’s campaign manager was so thin-skinned and defensive in the [recent South Bend Tribune article](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c1262f4369&e=5886ca081d)? Because Jackie and gang know we have the grassroots support and they don’t.

**Jackie knows Pat is formidable** and that Pat has made inroads in ways that have invited people to share and be heard. **Pat understands what is necessary in this historic time. Jackie is not up to the task. She is reckless and negligent in her duty as a representative.**

---

| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically._

Do not let anyone tell you Indiana 02 is so gerrymandered it can’t be won. It’s not truthful. It takes away your power. **Change that narrative and we will set ourselves on the course for better, healthier times in the days, months, and years to come.**

Thank you and take good care,
Rita

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Amy Coney Barrett: ‘I have an agenda to stick to the rule of law’
body:
It’s day two of Judge Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation hearings for the U.S. Supreme Court. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5303e5a0a6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 13, 2020
---
| | |
# **Amy Coney Barrett: ‘I have an agenda to stick to the rule of law’**

**It’s day two** of Judge Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation hearings for the U.S. Supreme Court. As expected, Judge Barrett is proving that she understands our Constitution and the importance of separation of powers far better than Senate Democrats do.

**Since**[**fewer than one-third**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd06b7181e&e=3ee4985eea) of Americans want the Senate to reject Barrett’s nomination, Democrats have made their strategy clear: distraction. Rather than question Judge Barrett’s credentials—which are outstanding and have received bipartisan praise—they are trying to disrupt the process with yet another fight about Obamacare.

**Of course,** it’s not a judge’s job to make policy. Amy Coney Barrett knows that.

**“Courts are not designed** to solve every problem or right every wrong in our public life,” she said yesterday. “The policy decisions and value judgements of government must be made by the political branches, elected by and accountable to the people.”

🎬 [**Judge Barrett: Courts are not designed to do the jobs of politicians**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=825f1d0f80&e=3ee4985eea)

**Keeping politics out** of the courtroom is at the heart of our Constitution’s separation of powers. If Senate Democrats don’t want to believe Judge Barrett or their Republican colleagues, they should at least heed the words of the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

“**A judge sworn to decide** impartially can offer no forecasts, no hints, for that would show not only disregard for the specifics of the particular case—it would display disdain for the entire judicial process,” Ginsburg said during her 1993 confirmation hearings.

**Chief Justice John Roberts** and Justices Elena Kagan, Samuel Alito, and Stephen Breyer all respected this standard and declined to comment on issues that might come before the court. So why are Democrats pressing Judge Barrett to do the opposite?

**Simple: “It was all cover** for the gripe Democrats don’t dare make publicly: that Barrett won’t be an activist justice seeking to read liberals’ wish lists into the Constitution,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “And that’s not good enough for Democrats who know how unpopular so many of their political dreams are.”

**Judge Barrett** has made it clear that her personal opinions would have zero impact on her rulings. Her track record as a federal judge backs that up. Senate Democrats may have no idea how our Constitution works, but, fortunately, Amy Coney Barrett does.

**“A judge must apply** the law as it is written, not as she wishes it were,” she said.

🎬 [**WATCH: America has a government of laws, not of men**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65d91a0d1b&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: It’s day two of Judge Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation hearings for the U.S. Supreme Court. | | | | | The White House • October 13, 2020 | | | Amy Coney Barrett: ‘I have an agenda to stick to the rule of law’ It’s day two of Judge Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation hearings for the U.S. Supreme Court. As expected, Judge Barrett is proving that she understands our Constitution and the importance of separation of powers far better than Senate Democrats do. Since of Americans want the Senate to reject Barrett’s nomination, Democrats have made their strategy clear: distraction. Rather than question Judge Barrett’s credentials—which are outstanding and have received bipartisan praise—they are trying to disrupt the process with yet another fight about Obamacare. Of course, it’s not a judge’s job to make policy. Amy Coney Barrett knows that. “Courts are not designed to solve every problem or right every wrong in our public life,” she said yesterday. “The policy decisions and value judgements of government must be made by the political branches, elected by and accountable to the people.” 🎬 Keeping politics out of the courtroom is at the heart of our Constitution’s separation of powers. If Senate Democrats don’t want to believe Judge Barrett or their Republican colleagues, they should at least heed the words of the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. “A judge sworn to decide impartially can offer no forecasts, no hints, for that would show not only disregard for the specifics of the particular case—it would display disdain for the entire judicial process,” Ginsburg said during her 1993 confirmation hearings. Chief Justice John Roberts and Justices Elena Kagan, Samuel Alito, and Stephen Breyer all respected this standard and declined to comment on issues that might come before the court. So why are Democrats pressing Judge Barrett to do the opposite? Simple: “It was all cover for the gripe Democrats don’t dare make publicly: that Barrett won’t be an activist justice seeking to read liberals’ wish lists into the Constitution,” the New York Post editorial board writes. “And that’s not good enough for Democrats who know how unpopular so many of their political dreams are.” Judge Barrett has made it clear that her personal opinions would have zero impact on her rulings. Her track record as a federal judge backs that up. Senate Democrats may have no idea how our Constitution works, but, fortunately, Amy Coney Barrett does. “A judge must apply the law as it is written, not as she wishes it were,” she said. 🎬 | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump disembarks Air Force One | October 12, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

subject: Who needs corporate PAC $$$? NOT US.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/440546d7a6cb/who-needs-corporate-pac-not-us?e=140a9b81e7)

| |

| | The outsize influence of big money in politics has to end. At the start of the campaign, we set some modest goals for fundraising and some very aggressive ones for talking to voters.

**We set out with something to prove, and we’ve proven it every single day. **

Congressional campaigns don’t need millions of dollars to win. We can turn away corporate PAC money and dollars we don’t feel good about taking and keep our focus on the direct voter contact that’s going to result in a victory — for the campaign and for the people of IL-16.

What we are proving now is that we can win. We are seeing early voting and mail ballot numbers that show that we are neck-and-neck.

Tomorrow is the mid-month filing deadline — it’s the last FEC report we file before Election Day, and we don’t need a ton of money to meet our goal. We are aiming for roughly $14,000 before Wednesday at midnight.

[**Can you help?**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=60a64d4804&e=140a9b81e7)
